name: Skywalker
description: Skywalker is an indica-dominant hybrid known for its potent effects and unique aroma, featuring THC levels between 15% and 23% with low CBD content.

grow_info.notes: Skywalker is a hybrid strain that can be grown both indoors and outdoors. It is a relatively easy strain to cultivate, making it a popular choice among growers of all experience levels. The plant typically takes around 8-10 weeks to flower and produces a medium to high yield. When growing Skywalker outdoors, it prefers a warm and dry climate, similar to the Mediterranean. It is typically ready for harvest in late September to early October. Skywalker plants tend to grow short and bushy, and they require regular pruning to maintain proper airflow and prevent mold and mildew growth. Growers may also want to use a trellis or other support structure to help the plants bear the weight of their dense buds.

description: Push Pop is an indica-dominant hybrid created by crossing Cookies and Cream with Temple Flo, delivering uplifting, euphoric effects and a smooth, enjoyable flavor.

name: Pancakes
description: Pancakes is a hybrid strain by Cookies and Seed Junkie Genetics, known for its delicious flavor and aroma that perfectly mimic a warm plate of pancakes.

name: Blue Sherbert
description: Blue Sherbert is a hybrid by The Plug Genetics, crossing Blue Cookies and Sunset Sherbert, featuring lime green and purple buds with a sweet blueberry and citrus flavor that leaves your mouth watering.

name: Space Candy
description: Space Candy is a hybrid strain by Heroes of the Farm, created by crossing Cherry Space Queen and Cotton Candy, offering a decadent flavor profile with sweet, candied notes.

name: OGKB
description: OGKB, or OG Kush Breath, is a hybrid strain descended from Girl Scout Cookies, delivering heavy, full-body effects ideal for long-lasting relief.

name: Magic Marker
description: Magic Marker is a hybrid strain by Seed Junky Genetics, crossing Permanent Marker and RS-11, known for its pungent aroma with a mix of astringent, minty, and chemical notes.

name: Love Potion
description: Love Potion is a 70% sativa strain by Reeferman Seeds, bred by crossing G13 with Santa Marta Colombian Gold and Colombian Gold again, resulting in a lemon and floral-tinged sativa hybrid.

grow_info.notes: Suitable for SCROG and SOG setupsSensitive to light and needs complete darkness during night cycle

name: Glookies
description: Glookies is a hybrid strain from Thin Mint and GG4, known for its calming, uplifting effects that often make users feel giggly, relaxed, and hungry.

name: White Durban
description: White Durban is a sativa-dominant strain by Fireline, blending White Fire OG and Durban Poison to deliver fast-acting, potent effects with vibrant African landrace heritage.

name: Space Runtz
description: Space Runtz is a hybrid strain created by crossing Runtz and Candy Rain, offering 22% THC for a balanced experience ideal for moderate to experienced cannabis users.

name: Pluto
description: Pluto is an indica strain from California’s Gashouse, bred by Seed Junky Genetics as a cross of Gelato #33 and 1991 Triangle Kush backcrossed once, known as TK 91 Bx1.

name: Black Widow
description: Black Widow is a balanced hybrid strain combining South American and South Indian sativas, offering a buzzy head high with relaxing effects and a fruity aroma.

name: Panama Red
description: Panama Red is a classic sativa strain from a Panama and Colombia cross, known since the 1960s for its fast, intense, and almost psychedelic effects.

name: Space Queen
description: Space Queen is a hybrid strain from Romulan and Cinderella 99, delivering a fast, intensely trippy head high with a distinctive, aromatic scent.

grow_info.notes: Growers say Space Queen has large, resinous buds that produce large yields.Good for sea of green (SOG) or screen of green (SCROG) operationsStretches tall during the first 3 weeks of floweringReservoir Seeds recommends a soil pH level of 5.8 to 6.0Grows best in warm, slightly arid environments up to 88°F (31°C) and rich in CO2

name: Garlic Breath
description: Garlic Breath is an indica-dominant hybrid created by crossing GMO with Mendo Breath, offering a pungent, savory flavor reminiscent of freshly peeled garlic with spicy undertones.

grow_info.notes: Growers say this strain can be grown indoors or outdoors and has an average flowering time of 8-10 weeks.

name: Juicy Fruit
description: Juicy Fruit is a hybrid cannabis strain created by crossing Afghani and Thai, known for its long-lasting effects and unique, fruity flavor profile.

grow_info.notes: Flowering time of 7-9 weeksSuitable for sea of green (SOG)May express compact indica or tall sativaphenotypesF

name: Lychee
description: Lychee is a hybrid strain created by crossing Pink Rozay with White Runtz, offering an uplifting, balanced head high with a deliciously sweet and fruity flavor and aroma.

name: Blueberry Pancakes
description: Blueberry Pancakes is an indica-dominant hybrid with dense deep purple buds and neon orange hairs, bred by Humboldt Seed Company and Wave Rider Nursery by crossing Blueberry Pancakes with Slurricane and Purple Panty Dropper.

name: Cinnamon Milk
description: Cinnamon Milk is a hybrid strain by Cookies and Powerzzzup, blending Cereal A La Mode and Sherb Z #1 to deliver creamy cinnamon warmth paired with uplifting euphoria.

name: Orange Crush
description: Orange Crush is a hybrid strain crossing California Orange and Blueberry, delivering uplifting cerebral effects with a super sweet and tangy flavor.

grow_info.notes: High calyx-to-leaf ratio makes for easy trimmingGrows best as a multi-branch plantDoes well with moderate to heavy nutrientsYields typically fall between 400-500g/m²

name: Snowman
description: Snowman, a hybrid made from Girl Scout Cookies, delivers a euphoric, uplifting high perfect for sparking creativity or deep reflection.

name: Cheesecake
description: Cheesecake is an indica strain created by crossing Confidential Cheese with F2 Girl Scout Candy, offering a calming experience with cheesy, earthy, and sweet flavors.

grow_info.notes: According to growers, Cheesecake features dark purple foliage with eye-catching orange hairs.

name: Romulan
description: Romulan is an indica strain created by crossing North American Indica with White Rhino, known for its pine scent and strong, therapeutic effects.

grow_info.notes: Aroma is best brought out when grown outdoors with organic fertilizersSuitable for sea of green (SOG) method

name: Apple Jack
description: Apple Jack is a hybrid strain created by crossing Jack Herer and White Widow, offering uplifting and soothing effects ideal for managing chronic pain and nausea.

name: XJ-13
description: XJ-13 is a hybrid strain created by crossing Jack Herer and G13 Haze, known for its therapeutic benefits and uplifting, euphoric effects.

name: Peaches and Cream
description: Peaches and Cream is a Skunk phenotype hybrid with a sweet, fruity flavor, floral and citrusy aroma, subtle spicy notes, and soft pink-orange buds.

name: Raspberry Kush
description: Raspberry Kush is an indica strain with a sweet raspberries and cream aroma that offers relaxing effects while inspiring creativity.

name: Vice City
description: Vice City is a 2022 hybrid strain from Exotic Genetix, created by crossing Sunset Runtz with Scotty 2 Hotty.

name: Mac and Cheese
description: Mac and Cheese is a hybrid strain created by crossing The Mac with Alien Cheese, known for its energizing effects that help users feel focused and uplifted.

grow_info.notes: According to growers, this strain has an average flowering time of 60 days.

name: Snowcap
description: Snowcap is a potent hybrid strain created by crossing Snow White with Haze, offering cerebral effects that boost creativity, happiness, and laughter.

name: Gazzurple
description: Gazzurple is an indica-dominant hybrid by Humboldt Seed Co, blending Gazzurple Bx2 with Poddy Mouth x Macaroon to create a flavorful purple strain known as “Purple Gas.”

name: Starfighter
description: Starfighter is an indica-dominant hybrid by Alien Genetics, blending Alien Tahoe OG and Lemon genetics to deliver a unique and highly sought-after experience among growers and connoisseurs.

name: Mendocino Purps
description: Mendocino Purps is a hybrid strain from Northern California’s Mendocino County, known for its rich purple hues and earning a Top Ten spot in High Times' 2007 Strains of the Year.

name: Pinnacle
description: Pinnacle is a hybrid strain combining legacy Blue Dream x Hindu Kush and modern Slurty 3x Gush Mints genetics, offering a balanced 50% sativa and 50% indica profile with around 20% THC.

name: Rainbow Chip
description: Rainbow Chip, a hybrid bred by Exotic Genetix, combines Sunset Sherbert and Mint Chocolate Chip to deliver vibrant terpene profiles and vigorous growth from the Mint Chocolate Chip lineage.

name: Strawberry Lemonade
description: Strawberry Lemonade is a sativa-dominant strain by Barney's Farm, a cross of Strawberry Cough and Lemon OG, known for its uplifting effects and citrusy, sweet flavors.

name: California Orange
description: California Orange is a classic hybrid strain dating back to the 1980s, known for its mysterious origins and timeless appeal among cannabis enthusiasts.

grow_info.notes: Mildew resistantEarly topping will cause plants to grow bushierClearing bottom branches ("lollipop") will encourage buds to grow stacked and dense

name: Gummy Bears
description: Gummy Bears, a hybrid by Elemental Seeds, blends Trueberry and Big Lemon to deliver a sweet, potent, and uniquely flavorful experience.

name: Red Pop
description: Red Pop, an indica by 710 Savant, is an Afghanicross named after a Michigan soda, known for its large buds and winner of the 2015 High Times Michigan Cannabis Cup live resin category.

name: Hawaiian
description: Hawaiian, a sativa strain, offers uplifting, creative effects and a tropical fruit aroma, perfect for relaxing after a long day or enjoying time at the beach.

name: Gobbstopper
description: Gobbstopper is a berry-flavored indica from Alphakronik Genes’ Wonka Series, bred by crossing Purple Urkle and Sin City Kush, known for its long-lasting fruity effects and high THC levels in the mid-20% range.

name: Papaya Bomb
description: Papaya Bomb is a Hybrid by Purple City Genetics, blending Papaya and THC Bomb for a flavorful, stony experience that delivers a powerful punch.

name: Dutch Treat
description: Dutch Treat is a hybrid strain combining Northern Lights and Haze, known for its uplifting, euphoric effects that reduce stress and relax the mind.

grow_info.notes: 63-72 days flowering

name: Jungle Juice
description: Jungle Juice is a hybrid by Golden State Genetics, blending Animal Cookies and Tangie, with sweet and sour citrus flavors that help relieve stress, sleeplessness, and pain.

name: SPK
description: SPK, a sativa-dominant strain also called "Sour Patch," combines Sour Diesel and Candyland, offering a pungent diesel and sweet earth aroma with happy, uplifting effects.

name: Purple Push Pop
description: Purple Push Pop is an indica-dominant strain by Seed Junky Genetics, featuring Cookies terpenes with creamy vanilla, soft citrus, and savory flavors from its Ice Cream Cake, Sunset Sherbet, and Jealousy genetics.

name: Golden Pineapple
description: Golden Pineapple is a hybrid cross of Golden Goat and Pineapple Kush that offers uplifting, creative effects with a fruity, tropical aroma reminiscent of sour pineapple.

name: Modified Bananas
description: Modified Bananas is a potent hybrid strain created by crossing Banana OG with GMO, known for its calming effects rather than energizing sensations.

name: Fatso
description: Fatso is an indica from Colorado breeder Cannarado, blending GMO Cookies and Legend OG into a funky, fuel-flavored strain that packs a high THC punch for fans of gas, Kush, and Cookies.

name: Lantz
description: Lantz, a hybrid by Ridgeline Farms from Green Lantern and Ridgeline Runtz, features tangy, sweet candy, and forest pine flavors.

name: Mai Tai
description: Mai Tai is a hybrid strain combining Maui Waui and Tutti Frutti, offering a delicious flavor and a full-bodied, uplifting high ideal for a relaxing afternoon.

name: Strawberry Diesel
description: Strawberry Diesel is a hybrid that combines NYC Diesel and Strawberry Cough, offering a balanced effect that relaxes muscles while boosting energy and clarity.

name: ACDC
description: ACDC is a CBD-dominant hybrid strain from Cannatonic, known for minimal intoxicating effects and often used by medical patients to help manage pain, anxiety, epilepsy, and other conditions.

name: Lemon OG
description: Lemon OG is an indica-dominant hybrid combining Las Vegas Lemon Skunk and The OG #18, known for its fast-acting effects and distinctive skunky lemon aroma.

name: Pineapple Upside Down Cake
description: Pineapple Upside Down Cake is a hybrid strain crossing Pineapple Trainwreck and Cookie Monster, offering relaxing muscle relief, tension release, mood improvement, and a sweet pastry-like aroma.

name: Pablo's Revenge
description: Pablo's Revenge is a 60% indica, 40% sativa hybrid combining Animal Mints and Sherb Cake genetics, offering a potent, exotic experience with sweet, peppery, and gassy flavors and aroma.

name: Strawberry Kush
description: Strawberry Kush is a hybrid strain combining Strawberry Cough and OG Kush, offering relaxing effects and a musky strawberry flavor that lives up to its name.

name: Pink Cookies
description: Pink Cookies is a hybrid strain combining Girl Scout Cookies and Cherry Pie, offering a flavorful blend of tangy sweetness, earthy tones, and subtle peppery notes.

name: Lemon Gelato
description: Lemon Gelato is an indica-dominant hybrid created by crossing Thin Mint Girl Scout Cookies, Lemon Haze, and Sunset Sherbet, known for its bold, distinct citrus aroma and flavorful taste.

grow_info.notes: According to growers, Lemon Gelato flowers into lumpy and sticky buds with dark green foliage.

name: Orange Sherbert
description: Orange Sherbert, a hybrid from Barney’s Farm, blends Orange Cream, Purple Urkle, and Cherry Pie to create dense green and purple buds with bright orange highlights and a sweet, candy-like flavor.

name: Rose Gold Runtz
description: Rose Gold Runtz is a hybrid strain bred by Compound Genetics, combining Apples & Bananas and White Runtz genetics, known for its high 32% THC content, making it ideal for experienced cannabis users.

name: Mac Daddy
description: Mac Daddy is a rare, indica-dominant hybrid strain (70% indica, 30% sativa) known for its unique genetics and limited availability in most dispensaries.

name: Pink Starburst
description: Pink Starburst, a potent hybrid by Manali West, blends DJ Short’s Blueberry x Headband with AJ Sour Diesel BX3, delivering a flavorful and powerful experience true to its name.

name: Illuminati OG
description: Illuminati OG is an Indica strain descended from Josh D’s 1996 Club 33 OG phenotype, serving as the genetic backbone of many West Coast cannabis varieties with a mysterious origin.

name: Sour OG
description: Sour OG, a hybrid strain from Sour Diesel and OG Kush, offers a balanced high with a popular and lasting presence in both clone and seed form.

name: Lemon Drop
description: Lemon Drop is a hybrid with mellow, fluffy buds that deliver a pleasant, giggly euphoria and focused effects, sometimes offering a gentle, relaxing body sensation without being overpowering.

name: Dirty Taxi
description: Dirty Taxi is a sativa-dominant hybrid created by crossing Chem i-95 with GMO, known for its calming effects that make users feel happy and relaxed.

name: Berry White
description: Berry White is a hybrid strain, also called "Barry White," bred from the renowned Blueberry and White Widow, known for its balanced effects and unique flavor.

grow_info.notes: 63-72 days flowering

name: Pineapple Punch
description: Pineapple Punch is a 70/30 sativa-dominant strain blending Skunk #1 and Hawaiian indica genetics, offering vibrant pineapple and tropical citrus flavors.

grow_info.notes: Yields about 300-500 grams per square meterMay express two different phenotypes: one grows taller and more sativa-like with thin leaves and wide internodal spacing, and the other is more indica-like with closer nodes, wider leaves, shorter stature, and heavier yieldsSoil preferred, but also suitable for hydro growsLow to medium organic nutrient regimen recommended

name: Green Goblin
description: Green Goblin is a sativa strain, likely a Green Crack phenotype, possibly crossed with Northern Lights and Skunk #1, with some versions showing hints of diesel.

name: Lemon Diesel
description: Lemon Diesel is a hybrid strain crossing California Sour and Lost Coast OG, offering relaxing effects that keep you focused and coherent, often described as a slow-building or "creeper" strain.

name: Oreo Blizzy
description: Oreo Blizzy is a hybrid strain known for promoting focus, creativity, and uplifting effects.

name: Hood Candyz
description: Hood Candyz is an indica-dominant hybrid strain, blending Runtz and Why U Gelly genetics, known for its sweet, fruity flavor with notes of grape and berry.

name: Jungle Pie
description: Jungle Pie is a balanced hybrid strain, created by crossing Jungle Cake and Wedding Pie, delivering a smooth, relaxing high with 20% THC.

name: Strawberry Haze
description: Strawberry Haze is a sativa strain created by Arjan, known for its sweet, fruity aroma and award-winning quality since 2006.

name: Vanilla Frosting
description: Vanilla Frosting is a hybrid from Humboldt Seed Company, blending Humboldt Frost OG and Humboldt Gelato Bx3, featuring dense silvery-green buds with purple hints and a creamy, smooth aroma with vanilla notes.

grow_info.notes: Designed to improve upon the various Gelato lines from the last few years, Vanilla Frosting takes to the sky with a vigorous growth pattern.

name: Dark Rainbow
description: Dark Rainbow is a hybrid strain created by crossing GMO with Rainbow Belts F1, known for its relaxing and giggly effects.

name: Zereal
description: Zereal is a balanced 50% sativa, 50% indica hybrid strain, created by crossing Cereal Milk and Zkittlez, featuring 20% THC and ideal for experienced cannabis users.

name: Sherbet Cake
description: Sherbet Cake is a hybrid strain created by crossing Girl Scout Cookies and Pink Panties, delivering a well-balanced high that many users enjoy.

grow_info.notes: According to growers, this strain flowers into purple buds with heavy trichome coverage.

name: Triple Scoop
description: Triple Scoop is a hybrid blending Super Silver Haze, Grape LA, and Sorbet, offering a citrus burst, sweet berry notes, and a smooth, creamy finish.

name: Pineapple
description: Pineapple, a hybrid also called Pineapple OG, is developed from Ed Rosenthal’s Super Bud and is known for its uplifting and relaxing effects that help relieve stress.

name: Garlic
description: Garlic is a classic indica strain from the ’90s, bred by The Seed Bank with Afghan genetics, known for its aroma of tangy musk and spice rather than garlic.

name: King's Juice
description: King’s Juice, a hybrid by Greenhouse Seed Co., blends King's Kush and Mimosa to deliver uplifting citrus, fruit, and earthy flavors, perfect for socializing and engaging in creative activities during summer.

name: Purple Cream
description: Purple Cream, an indica, is a mellow, calming strain favored for nighttime use that relaxes muscles and eases anxiety with a moderate body-heavy sensation.

name: Tropic Thunder
description: Tropic Thunder is a hybrid Maui Wowie cross with colorful buds and floral aromas, delivering a moderate, mellow buzz that uplifts the mood and suits daytime use.

name: Grape Runtz
description: Grape Runtz is an indica-dominant hybrid strain created by crossing Zkittles, Gelato, Grape Ape, and OG Kush, known for its calming effects.

name: F1 Durb
description: F1 Durb is a rare sativa hybrid created by Bay Area breeder Jigga, crossing his own "F1" with Durban, and is seldom sold or used in breeding.

name: Dragon Fruit
description: Dragon Fruit is a hybrid from Bodhi Seeds crossing Snow Lotus with Oldsog’s Silver Haze, featuring lime green buds coated in trichomes and delivering a buzzing effect for both mind and body.

name: Jelly Breath
description: Jelly Breath is an indica-dominant hybrid bred by In House Genetics, combining Mendo Breath and Do-Si-Dos for a potent 21% THC experience ideal for seasoned consumers.

name: Triple Burger
description: Triple Burger is a mostly indica strain by Skunk House Genetics, bred from GMO and Double Burger, known for its potent effects and pungent, gassy aroma.

name: Candy Cane
description: Candy Cane is a 70% indica strain by Crop King Seeds with AK-47, Mango, and White Widow genetics, offering a sour, fruity flavor and long-lasting euphoric effects that help relieve stress and tension.

name: Sweet Tooth
description: Sweet Tooth is an indica strain created by crossing Hawaiian and Nepali, offering uplifting and euphoric effects that help relieve stress and headaches.

grow_info.notes: Growers say the colas on this strain are candy-coated with trichomes.Yields tend to fall between 350-450 g/m²

name: Cherry AK-47
description: Cherry AK-47 is a rare hybrid with reddish-purple hues, offering smooth cherry flavors and a creamy sandalwood aroma that reflect its distinctive berry scent.

name: Gorilla Butter
description: Gorilla Butter is a hybrid strain created by crossing Peanut Butter Breath with GG4, offering balanced effects with 18% THC.

grow_info.notes: According to growers, Gorilla Butter has an average flowering time of 60 days and can be grown indoors and outdoors.

name: UK Cheese
description: UK Cheese is a potent hybrid strain, a Skunk #1 phenotype known for its energetic and euphoric effects, making it ideal for experienced cannabis users.

name: Goofiez
description: Goofiez is a hybrid strain created by crossing Apples & Bananas with Jokerz, featuring 28% THC and ideal for experienced cannabis consumers.

name: Pineapple Kush
description: Pineapple Kush is a hybrid strain combining Pineapple and Master Kush, delivering cerebral effects with a light body sensation and a subtly sweet pineapple flavor.

name: Hawaiian Snow
description: Hawaiian Snow is a sativa blending Neville’s Haze, Pure Haze, and Hawaiian Haze genetics, known for its tall, stretchy growth and classic uplifting effects.

name: Sugar Cane
description: Sugar Cane is a hybrid strain created by crossing Platinum and Slurricane, offering 17% THC for a balanced experience suitable for both beginners and seasoned cannabis users.

name: Unicorn Poop
description: Unicorn Poop is a hybrid strain created by crossing GMO Cookies with the rare Sophisticated Lady, bred by Thug Pug.

name: Banana Daddy
description: Banana Daddy, a hybrid by Ethos Genetics, combines Granddaddy Purp and Banana Hammock R1 to deliver chunky purple buds with bubblegum and gas terpenes and a heavy, relaxing high.

name: Blueberry Pie
description: Blueberry Pie is an indica-dominant hybrid combining the famous Girl Scout Cookies and Blue Dream strains, blending their unique traits into a powerful and flavorful experience.

name: Lemon Poppers
description: Lemon Poppers is a hybrid strain known for its energizing, focused, and arousing effects.

name: Gummiez
description: Gummiez is a sativa-dominant hybrid created by crossing Jet Fuel Gelato and Peach Ringz, known for its 21% THC content and appeal to experienced cannabis users.

name: Z Cube
description: Z Cube is a hybrid strain by Dying Breed Seeds, blending Zkittlez and OG Kush for a sweet, fruity aroma with syrupy, candy-like flavors that leave a lasting impression.

name: Purple Candy
description: Purple Candy is an indica-dominant hybrid from British Columbia, known for its strong relaxing effects, making it ideal for those seeking effective, all-around medicinal relief.

name: Watermelon Gelato
description: Watermelon Gelato is an indica-dominant hybrid created by crossing Watermelon Zkittlez with Gelato 45, delivering uplifting effects that quickly relax the mind with a gentle cerebral haze.

grow_info.notes: Growers say this strain comes in dense, medium-sized buds with hues of lime green and dark purple.

name: Island Sweet Skunk
description: Island Sweet Skunk is a sativa strain created by crossing Sweet Pink Grapefruit with Skunk #1, known for its energetic and uplifting effects.

grow_info.notes: Best results with excellent air circulationClearing lower branches can improve circulation and air flowGrows best in temperatures between 70 to 80°F (21 to 27°C) and at 50% humidity

name: Holy Grail Kush
description: Holy Grail Kush is an award-winning indica-dominant hybrid bred from Kosher Kush and OG Kush #18, known for its 20% THC and balanced effects.

name: Peach Crescendo F-1
description: Peach Crescendo F-1, a hybrid from Ethos Genetics’ Unique Boutique Line, blends Chem D, I-95, Mandarin Cookies, and Peach Rings to deliver flavors ranging from sour Chem D to sweet, tropical citrus.

name: Tangerine
description: Tangerine is a sativa-dominant hybrid with a fruity tangerine aroma complemented by hints of mango and pineapple.

grow_info.notes: Outdoor growing provides the greatest yields, of up to 350 grams; compared to indoor growing which can yield less than 100 grams. Indoor or outdoor grows can expect flowers between 7 and 8 weeks. Generally, Tangerine is easy to grow, high in yield, and good smoking!

name: Khalifa Mints
description: Khalifa Mints is a hybrid strain from Wiz Khalifa's Khalifa Kush brand, crossing Khalifa Kush with The Menthol for a smooth, minty experience.

name: Lemonnade
description: Lemonnade is a sativa-dominant hybrid strain, created by crossing Lemon OG and Gorilla Haze, known for its fresh, zesty lemon aroma and flavor.

name: Gorilla Z
description: Gorilla Z, a hybrid from Original Glue and The Original Z, offers medium-to-high THC levels and is best suited for experienced smokers.

name: La Bomba
description: La Bomba is a hybrid strain created by crossing Wedding Cake and Jet Fuel Gelato, featuring dense green and dark purple buds with amber hairs and providing relaxing, euphoric, and uplifting effects.

name: OG Chem
description: OG Chem is a sativa-dominant hybrid combining Chemdawg’s diesel aroma with OG Kush’s sour, piney scent for a balanced and flavorful experience.

name: Point Break
description: Point Break is an Indica hybrid from Surfr Seeds featuring magenta, trichome-covered buds and a paradisiacal terpene profile.

name: Zowahh
description: Zowahh is a hybrid strain by Karma Genetics, blending Zkittlez and Karma Sour Diesel to deliver sweet, sour, and tropical flavors with intense cerebral effects, thriving best when grown indoors.

name: Moroccan Peaches
description: Moroccan Peaches is a hybrid strain by Purple City Genetics, crossing Spanish Barbara and Lemon Tree Skorange, known for its intense peach aroma and uplifting effects, winning first place in the Rosin category at the 2023 Emerald Cup.

name: Critical
description: Critical is a hybrid by Royal Queen Seeds, crossing Afghan and heirloom Skunk strains to deliver a fast-growing, stony plant with high-quality yields, ideal for northern climates.

name: Skittlez Mintz
description: Skittlez Mintz is a hybrid cannabis strain known for its unique flavors and effects that are still being explored by users.

name: Laughing Gas
description: Laughing Gas is a hybrid cross of Sour Diesel and Cherry Pie, known for its pungent fuel aroma blended with hints of grass, pine, and subtle sweetness, featuring dense, knobby buds.

name: Sour Runtz
description: Sour Runtz is a hybrid strain created by crossing Sour Diesel and Runtz, known for inducing relaxation, happiness, and creativity.

name: Champagne Kush
description: Champagne Kush is a hybrid strain created by crossing Hashplant and Hindu Kush, offering a balanced experience with 14% THC, making it a great choice for beginners.

name: Baby Yoda
description: Baby Yoda is a hybrid strain created by crossing Khalifa Kush and The Menthol, featuring bright green buds with orange hairs and golden trichomes, reminiscent of the character Yoda’s vibrant colors.

name: Gelato Runtz
description: Gelato Runtz is a hybrid cannabis strain bred by Elev8, combining Runtz and Gelato #33 genetics with 21% THC, making it a great choice for experienced consumers.

name: Dirty Sprite Breath
description: Dirty Sprite Breath is a hybrid strain created by crossing Mendo Breath and Lemon Tree, offering a potent 22% THC ideal for experienced cannabis users.

name: Cat Piss
description: Cat Piss is a sativa strain and Super Silver Haze phenotype known for its uplifting effects and sweet, piney flavors that leave users feeling happy and functional.

name: Galactic Runtz
description: Galactic Runtz is a hybrid strain created by crossing Runtz and Falcon 9, known for its relaxing, euphoric, and tingly effects with a dominant myrcene terpene profile.

name: Member Berry
description: Member Berry is a hybrid strain created by crossing Skunkberry with Mandarin Sunset, offering a long-lasting, happy, and euphoric high with a sweet, fruity aroma.

name: Cannalope Haze
description: Cannalope Haze is a sativa strain created by crossing Original Haze with Mexican landrace, offering a sweet blend of tropical and melon flavors.

name: White Cookies
description: White Cookies is a potent hybrid, created by crossing White Widow and Girl Scout Cookies, known for stimulating appetite and relieving pain with its sweet, balanced effects.

name: Honey Bun
description: Honey Bun is a potent hybrid by Cookies, named for its extremely sweet, tasty flavors that deliver an instant, enjoyable high.

name: Agent Orange
description: Agent Orange is a balanced hybrid with uplifting, motivating effects and a fresh-cut citrus aroma that boosts mood and energy when feeling lethargic or down.

name: Bubba Fett
description: Bubba Fett is a hybrid strain created by crossing Stardawg and Pre-98 Bubba Kush, known for its pungent, skunky, and sweet aroma, delivering relaxing and sedating effects.

name: Orange Push Pop
description: Orange Push Pop is an indica-dominant hybrid created by crossing Triangle Kush with Orange Cookies, offering uplifting effects that relax the mind and create a pleasant body tingle.

name: Sweet Tart
description: Sweet Tart is a hybrid strain blending Afghani, Purple Thai, and ATF, delivering fast-acting, euphoric effects that melt away stress while keeping your mind clear and relaxed.

grow_info.notes: According to growers, this strain comes in tall and curly green foliate with lime green accents. Sweet Tart was originally bred by Twisty Seeds.

name: Lavender
description: Lavender, an indica strain by Soma Seeds, blends Super Skunk, Big Skunk Korean, and Afghani Hawaiian genetics for a unique and relaxing experience.

name: Creamsicle
description: Creamsicle is a hybrid strain combining Orange Crush and Juicy Fruit, featuring a bold citrus flavor with creamy vanilla notes.

name: Frosty
description: Frosty, an indica-dominant hybrid, delivers calming effects with a strong, happy head high, making it perfect for relaxation.

name: Exodus Cheese
description: Exodus Cheese is a hybrid strain originating from Southern England in the late 1980s, known as the original clone-only "Cheese" variety grown from Sensi Seeds Skunk #1.

name: Bubba x Fire
description: Bubba x Fire is a hybrid strain created by crossing Pre-98 Bubba Kush with Fire OG, delivering an upbeat, buzzy high that leaves users feeling happy and a bit giggly.

name: Kush Cake
description: Kush Cake is an indica-dominant hybrid created by crossing Cherry Pie with Girl Scout Cookies, delivering happy, uplifting effects that boost mood and melt away stress.

grow_info.notes: According to growers, Kush Cake buds are pointy with light green and orange hairs, and a little bit of frost. This strain is traditionally grown indoors.

name: Blueberry Diesel
description: Blueberry Diesel is a hybrid combining Blueberry and Sour Diesel, known for its strong blueberry aroma with subtle fuel hints and sticky, flavorful flowers.

grow_info.notes: 63-72 days flowering

name: MK Ultra
description: MK Ultra is a potent indica strain, created by crossing OG Kush with G13, known for its fast-acting euphoric effects ideal for strong relief.

name: Yellow Zushi
description: Yellow Zushi is a hybrid cannabis strain with flavors and effects still being explored by users.

name: Blueberry Yum Yum
description: Blueberry Yum Yum is a hybrid cannabis strain popularized by Ludacris, known for its Blueberry indica lineage and unique effects.

name: Malawi Gold
description: Malawi Gold is a legendary sativa landrace from Malawi, known for its tall plants and long, resin-coated buds, consistently thriving in its native climate.

name: Smackerz
description: Smackerz is a hybrid strain from Gorilla Glue and Rozay, known for its sweet, vibrant flavors that brighten your day with a potent 31.48% THC content.

name: Frosted Cherry Cookies
description: Frosted Cherry Cookies is a trichome-rich hybrid bred by Liberty Reach, offering a sweet, flavorful experience reminiscent of the classic Cherry Cookies and The White strains.

name: Green Gelato

name: White Russian
description: White Russian is a sativa-dominant hybrid created by crossing White Widow with AK-47, delivering euphoric, cerebral effects that provide physical relaxation alongside a stimulating mental high.

grow_info.notes: According to growers, you can expect this strain to produce medium-sized fluffy buds that are frosted with trichomes.

name: Strawberry Amnesia
description: Strawberry Amnesia, a sativa from Dinafem Seeds bred from Strawberry Cough and Amnesia, offers uplifting effects with sweet strawberry and earthy flavors.

name: Chocolate Thai
description: Chocolate Thai is a legendary Thai landrace sativa known since the 1960s for its potent high and distinctive “Thai sticks” presentation with spindly flowers tied to bamboo.

grow_info.notes: When growing outdoors, crowd plants similar to hemp grown for fiber to obtain reasonable yields.

name: Magic Melon
description: Magic Melon is a hybrid from Humboldt Seed Company with lime green buds tinged purple, offering tropical fruity aromas of cantaloupe, watermelon, and mango, finished with a hint of gassy notes.

name: Bio-Jesus
description: Bio-Jesus is a hybrid strain created by crossing Gumbo with Bio-Diesel, known for its powerful pain relief, numbing effects, and euphoric, intense body high.

name: Tropical Gelato
description: Tropical Gelato is a balanced hybrid strain combining Gelato and Pineapple genetics, delivering a fruity flavor and a relaxing yet uplifting 50/50 sativa-indica high.

name: Watermelon Runtz
description: Watermelon Runtz is an indica-dominant hybrid with bold purple buds and a fruity aroma, offering intensely euphoric, slightly sleepy, and tingly effects.

name: Kool Whip
description: Kool Whip is a mostly indica strain bred from Ice Cream Cake and Project 4516, featuring a sweet, creamy flavor with notes of vanilla and dough, inspired by its whipped cream namesake.

name: Death Bubba
description: Death Bubba is an indica strain bred by Matteo Suleyman in Vancouver, created by crossing Death Star with Bubba Kush, known for its pungent aroma of grass and skunk.

name: Cherry Blossom
description: Cherry Blossom is an indica strain by East Fork Cultivars with a balanced 1:1 THC to CBD ratio, typically 9-11% each, bred from Cherry Pie and Harle-Tsu genetics.

name: Alien Kush
description: Alien Kush is a potent Indica cross of LVPK and Alien Dawg from California, delivering a spacey, cerebral high that can feel active and occasionally psychedelic.

name: Smarties
description: Smarties is a hybrid from Connected Cannabis Co. and Cookies Fam, blending GSC and Blue City Diesel for a sweet, fruity, and tart terpene profile reminiscent of the candy.

name: Banana Cake
description: Banana Cake is a hybrid strain created by crossing Banana OG and Wedding Cake, known for its 20% THC content and popular among experienced cannabis users.

name: Galactic Gas
description: Galactic Gas is a hybrid cannabis strain with flavors and effects that are still being explored, inviting users to share their experiences.

name: LA Baker
description: LA Baker is a hybrid strain combining The Cookies and Sorbet, offering a sweet, fruity flavor with notes of lemon, berry, nutty marshmallow, and crisp mint.

name: Cake Crasher
description: Cake Crasher is a sativa-dominant hybrid created by crossing Wedding Cake with Wedding Crasher, offering a relaxing experience that helps you unwind and melt away stress.

grow_info.notes: Growers say Cake Crasher flowers into fluffy, pointed buds with light green and dark purple foliage.

name: High Fructose Corn Syrup
description: High Fructose Corn Syrup is a 60% indica, 40% sativa hybrid combining GMO and OZ Kush bx2 genetics, known for its potent effects with THC levels around 24%.

name: Blueberry Headband
description: Blueberry Headband is a hybrid strain combining Headband and Blueberry, delivering a euphoric rush with relaxing body effects and a sweet blueberry flavor and aroma.

name: Kush Crasher
description: Kush Crasher is a 70% indica, 30% sativa hybrid strain created by crossing Pure Kush and Wedding Crasher, known for its high potency with THC levels reaching up to 32%.

name: Garlic Juice
description: Garlic Juice is a hybrid strain created by crossing GMO and Papaya, known for its potent 31% THC content, making it a great choice for experienced cannabis users.

name: Deadhead OG
description: Deadhead OG is an indica-dominant hybrid created by crossing Chemdog 91 with SFV OG Kush, popular among experienced users for its potent effects.

grow_info.notes: Prefers moderate amounts of fertilizerTrains well as a multi-branched plant or with sea of green (SOG) operationsAverage yield falls between 25-30 grams per plant

name: Cake Mix
description: Cake Mix is a hybrid strain created by crossing Wedding Cake and London Poundcake, known for its 24% THC and ideal for experienced cannabis users.

name: THC Bomb
description: THC Bomb is a potent hybrid strain with energizing, happy effects and a citrus flavor complemented by woody undertones, featuring large buds adorned with bright orange hairs.

name: Rainbow Z
description: Rainbow Z, a hybrid strain from The Original Z and OG Eddy Lepp, is highly potent with about 25% THC, offering a powerful and balanced experience.

name: G13 Haze
description: G13 Haze is a hybrid combining G13’s potent, medical benefits with Haze’s uplifting effects, delivering a balanced blend of strong body sensations and an energizing high.

name: Giraffe P
description: Giraffe P is a bold hybrid from Bakery Genetics, created by crossing MILF and Astronaut P, designed to deliver a powerful and uplifting high.

name: Pineapple Haze
description: Pineapple Haze is a sativa strain that blends tropical pineapple aroma with the uplifting, energetic effects of Haze, featuring tall plants with large, fragrant colas.

grow_info.notes: Prefers a sunny Mediterranean climate

name: Blue Candy
description: Blue Candy is a balanced hybrid strain combining Blueberry and Cotton Candy Kush genetics for an even blend of indica and sativa effects.

name: Zlushi
description: Zlushi is an indica-dominant hybrid strain created by crossing Ice Cream Cake, Grape Zkittlez, and Gelato 41, featuring about 20% THC and 1% CBD.

name: Novarine
description: Novarine is a sativa-dominant hybrid created by crossing Caprichosa Thai with a Thai landrace, known for its rare and exotic THCV-rich cannabinoid profile.

name: Mandarin Sunset
description: Mandarin Sunset, an indica bred by Ethos Genetics by crossing Herijuana with Orange Skunk, offers a rich, skunky orange flavor that's especially notable in concentrate form.

name: Paris OG
description: Paris OG is an indica-dominant hybrid known for its calming effects that promote deep relaxation and restful sleep.

name: Frosted Runtz
description: Frosted Runtz is a balanced hybrid strain, combining Ice Cream Cake and White Runtz genetics, offering a creamy, smooth smoke with sweet, fruity, and piney candy flavors.

name: Purple Thai
description: Purple Thai is a mostly sativa strain that combines Highland Oaxacan Gold and Chocolate Thai for a unique and flavorful experience.

name: Animal Mint Cake
description: Animal Mint Cake is a hybrid strain created by crossing Animal Cookies and Wedding Cake, known for its high 31% THC content, making it ideal for experienced cannabis users.

name: Dogwalker OG
description: Dogwalker OG is a balanced hybrid strain created by crossing Albert Walker OG with Chemdawg 91, offering cerebral, calming effects that enhance focus and, in larger doses, induce deep sleepiness.

name: Purple Gushers
description: Purple Gushers is a balanced hybrid strain created by crossing Purple Punch and Gelato, combining the best traits of both indica and sativa genetics.

name: Diamond OG
description: Diamond OG is an indica strain bred from OG Kush and an unknown strain, featuring 17% THC and offering a balanced experience ideal for beginner cannabis users.

name: Blunicorn
description: Blunicorn is a balanced hybrid strain created by crossing Blue Sherbert and Unicorn Poop, offering a smooth experience with 20% THC suitable for both beginners and experienced users.

name: Black Cherry Gushers
description: Black Cherry Gushers is a balanced hybrid strain, created by crossing Acai and Black Cherry Funk, known for its 26% THC and ideal for experienced users.

name: Frostbite
description: Frostbite is a mostly sativa strain with frosty, trichome-covered buds and a warm, earthy aroma featuring spicy, tea-like notes, thriving best when grown indoors.

name: Halle Berry
description: Halle Berry is a balanced hybrid strain, a cross of Ice Cream Cake and Blockberry, with 20% THC, ideal for experienced cannabis users.

name: Orange Z
description: Orange Z is a potent hybrid crossing The Original Z and Agent Orange, offering a strong citrus aroma with subtle earthy notes for a refreshing, uplifting experience.

name: White Cherry OG
description: White Cherry OG is a hybrid strain combining White Cherry and OG genetics, known for its 20% THC content and suitability for experienced cannabis users.

name: Mint Chocolate Chip
description: Mint Chocolate Chip is a rare hybrid cross of SinMint Cookies and Green Ribbon, offering a sweet, minty, herbal aroma with uplifting effects balanced by functional relaxation.

name: Incredible Hulk
description: Incredible Hulk is a sativa strain combining Green Crack and Jack Herer genetics, delivering stimulating effects that boost creativity and social energy with hints of blueberry and pineapple.

name: Raspberry Parfait
description: Raspberry Parfait is a sativa-dominant hybrid by Humboldt Seed Company, created from Truffula-tree and Shishkaberry, offering a potent 21% THC for experienced users.

name: Apes In Space
description: Apes In Space is a rare hybrid strain from Exotic Genetix, blending Falcon 9 and Grease Monkey genetics with a skunky, earthy, and spicy flavor and a potent, balanced high.

name: Skilatti
description: Skilatti is a balanced hybrid strain, a cross between Zkittlez and Gelatti, perfect for both daytime socializing and relaxing with movies.

name: Orange Cream
description: Orange Cream is a hybrid strain from Exotic Genetix that blends Orange Valley OG and Cookies and Cream, delivering a smooth citrus flavor and uplifting, intoxicating effects.

name: Great White Shark
description: Great White Shark is a sativa strain created by crossing Super Skunk #1 with South American and South Indian sativas, delivering a strong, euphoric body buzz.

grow_info.notes: Growers say this strain grows best indoors and has a flowering time of 8-10 weeks.

name: Blue Haze
description: Blue Haze is a slightly sativa-dominant hybrid strain, born from Blueberry indica and original Haze, known for its pleasing taste, aroma, and dense, fuzzy buds.

name: MAC #10
description: MAC #10 is a balanced hybrid strain created by crossing Miracle Alien Cookies with Columbia Gold and Starfighter, known for its unique effects and rising popularity.

grow_info.notes: According to growers, this strain flowers into purple buds with a heavy layer of white trichomes and bright orange hairs.

name: Sherbacio
description: Sherbacio, a hybrid by Alien Labs bred from Sunset Sherbert and Gelato #41, delivers a positive mood boost with a deliciously flavorful terpene profile.

name: Tally Mon
description: Tally Mon is a balanced hybrid strain created by crossing Banana OG x Do-Si-Dos with Papaya, known for its uplifting, relaxing effects and ability to enhance sexual arousal.

name: Curelato
description: Curelato is a balanced hybrid strain, crossing Gelato 33 with an unknown parent, offering 21.5% THC and ideal for experienced cannabis users.

name: Grandi Guava
description: Grandi Guava is an indica-leaning hybrid by Grandiflora, blending Guava and Gelato genetics to deliver fruity, cheesy aromas with tropical guava and creamy blue cheese flavors.

name: Purple Sunset
description: Purple Sunset, an Indica from Ethos Genetics, blends Purple Punch, Mandarin Sunset, and Mandarin Cookies to deliver fruity terpenes with sweet, citrus, spicy, and floral berry notes for a calming experience.

name: Laughy Taffy
description: Laughy Taffy is a slightly sativa-dominant hybrid strain (60% sativa/40% indica) rumored to be a cross between Banana OG and Pestilence, though its exact lineage remains unconfirmed.

name: Lemonberry
description: Lemonberry is a hybrid strain by Fusion Seeds, blending Dabney Blue and Lemon Thai to deliver sweet berry flavors and a refreshing lemon aroma.

name: Baby Turtle
description: Baby Turtle is a hybrid strain by Wiz Khalifa’s Khalifa Kush team, crossing Khalifa Kush and Jokerz #31 to create a potent, relaxing cannabis experience.

name: Zours
description: Zours is a hybrid strain known for making users feel happy, uplifted, and energetic.

name: Cherry Cola
description: Cherry Cola is an indica strain known for its sweet, fruity flavor and relaxing effects, recognized for competing in the 2014 L.A. Cannabis Cup.

name: Animal Cake
description: Animal Cake is a sativa-leaning hybrid strain, bred from Birthday Cake and Animal Cookies, offering a balanced experience with 21% THC, perfect for beginner cannabis users.

name: Emergen C
description: Emergen C is a balanced hybrid strain, a cross of Orange Push Pop and Sunset Sherbet, known for its citrus aroma reminiscent of fresh orange juice and a dense, flavorful experience.

name: Strawberry Fields
description: Strawberry Fields, an indica-dominant hybrid by Sagarmatha Seeds, blends the fruity aroma of Strawberry Cough with an undisclosed indica for a flavorful, strawberry-scented experience.

name: Kali Mist
description: Kali Mist is a sativa known for its clear-headed, energetic effects that can sometimes feel psychedelic, believed to have originated in the 1990s from crossing two sativa-dominant hybrids.

name: Apple Pie
description: Apple Pie is a hybrid sativa strain created by crossing Acapulco Gold and Nepalese, offering a balanced and flavorful experience ideal for seasoned cannabis users.

name: Baby Jokerz
description: Baby Jokerz is an indica phenotype of the Jokerz strain, featuring vibrant purple and green buds with strong fuel aromas and hints of citrus candy.

name: Chronic
description: Chronic is a hybrid strain combining Northern Lights, Skunk, and AK-47, known for its energizing and uplifting effects with sweet honey, floral, and spicy flavors.

grow_info.notes: Growers say Chronic weed can be grown outdoors but should be somewhat sheltered for protection.  The veg cycle is recommended for 33-days; Chronic has a flowering time of 63 days. The plant prefers a pH level between 6.2 and 6.8. It typically yields in fall around 600 grams per meter squared.

name: Red Congolese
description: Red Congolese is a sativa strain popularized in California that blends African, Mexican, and Afghani landrace genetics, resulting in a unique mix with some indica-like traits.

name: Ultra Sour
description: Ultra Sour is a sativa-dominant strain by THSeeds, blending MK Ultra and East Coast Sour Diesel to deliver uplifting stimulation, heady euphoria, and a pine-scented, tart aroma.

name: Pink Champagne
description: Pink Champagne is an indica hybrid created by crossing Granddaddy Purple with Cherry Pie, delivering buzzy effects that settle behind the eyes for a relaxing experience.

name: Pink Berry
description: Pink Berry, an indica-dominant strain by Apothecary Genetics, blends Pink Champagne and Blackberry to deliver sweet, fruity flavors with deeply relaxing effects.

name: Crumbled Lime
description: Crumbled Lime is a sativa bred by Karma Squad, blending Citron Cookies and Biker Kush to deliver dense lime-green buds with a unique lime, orange, and sweet flavor profile.

name: Duct Tape
description: Duct Tape is a hybrid strain created by crossing Original Glue (GG#4) and Do-Si-Dos, featuring 25% THC and 1% CBG, making it a great choice for experienced cannabis users.

name: Jawbreaker
description: Jawbreaker is a hybrid strain combining Purple Punch and Grape Pie, offering a sweet, fruity, candy-like aroma and flavor with a THC content of 20%-25%.

name: Sour Candy
description: Sour Candy is a hybrid legacy strain blending Sour Diesel and Bubble Gum, known for its delightful flavors and uplifting, happy effects.

grow_info.notes: 75-85 days flowering

name: Wingsuit
description: Wingsuit is a hybrid strain known for boosting focus, appetite, and energy.

name: Banana Sherbet
description: Banana Sherbet is a potent hybrid created by crossing Banana Kush and Sunset Sherbet, favored by artists and creators for its inspiring effects.

name: Grape Kush
description: Grape Kush is a hybrid strain known for its sharp, fruity aroma and long-lasting effects that deliver euphoric head highs and a deeply relaxed body.

name: Purple Raine
description: Purple Raine is an indica-dominant hybrid bred by Taylor Lane Farms, combining Purple Candy Kush, OG Kush, and Chemdawg, known for its sweet, fruity aroma and rich genetics.

name: Mandarin Z
description: Mandarin Z is a hybrid combining California Black Rosé and Mandarin Sunset, featuring dense, resinous buds with striking purple, black, and red hues and a low leaf-to-flower ratio.

name: Future #1
description: Future #1, a hybrid by Anesia Seeds crossing Original Glue and Starfighter, delivers a potent, euphoric high with a delicious pineapple, citrus, and mango terpene profile perfect for creativity.

name: Chocolate Diesel
description: Chocolate Diesel is a sativa strain combining Sour Diesel and Chocolate Thai genetics, delivering uplifting euphoria that hits the head like a strong cup of coffee.

name: Frozen Lemons
description: Frozen Lemons is a balanced hybrid strain, combining genetics from Freezer Burn and Lemon Fire, known for its frosty appearance and creamy lemon drop flavor and aroma.

name: Studio 54
description: Studio 54 is a balanced hybrid strain created by crossing Sunset, Sherbert, and OZ Kush #54, known for its rare and exotic genetics from Deep East Farms and Doja.

name: Orange Runtz
description: Orange Runtz is a hybrid strain created by crossing African Orange and Runtz, known for its balanced effects and 25% THC, making it suitable for both beginners and experienced cannabis users.

name: Milky Way
description: Milky Way is an 80/20 indica-dominant strain by Kiwiseeds, known for its milky white trichomes, sweet sugar and spice aroma, and relaxing effects.

grow_info.notes: Recommended to harvest when 1/3 of trichomes have turned amber50 - 60 days floweringGreenhouse or indoor recommended

name: Cake Batter
description: Cake Batter, a hybrid descended from Wedding Cake, is more energetic and popular on the West Coast as part of the dessert strain trend of the 2010s.

name: Churro
description: Churro is a balanced 50% sativa, 50% indica hybrid with 24% THC, offering a potent experience ideal for seasoned cannabis users.

name: End Game
description: End Game is a balanced hybrid strain, a cross between Ethos Cookies #4 and Purple Sunset, known for its large, dense buds and complex terpene profile.

name: Sunshine Daydream
description: Sunshine Daydream is an indica-dominant strain from Bodhi Seeds, blending Appalachia and Bubbashine, offering a complex flavor of tangy diesel, fruit, and sweet berry undertones.

name: Black Magic Kush
description: Black Magic Kush is an indica-dominant strain with jade green leaves, bright orange pistils, and a sweet, berry-rich terpene profile that delivers a flavorful and smooth experience.

name: Charlotte's Web
description: Charlotte's Web is a sativa hemp strain bred by the Stanley Brothers in Colorado for its high CBD and low THC content.

name: Hawaiian Haze
description: Hawaiian Haze is a sativa strain blending Hawaiian and Haze genetics, known for its light, airy buds that deliver uplifting, social, and energizing effects.

grow_info.notes: These plants grow tall and flower slowly, taking between 12 and 14 weeks, so they are probably better suited for a grower with some experience and patience.

name: Coochie Runtz
description: Coochie Runtz is a hybrid cannabis strain created by crossing Runtz with an unknown strain, gaining popularity since its 2022 debut for its unique effects and appeal to Runtz enthusiasts.

name: Blow Pop
description: Blow Pop is a 70% indica hybrid created by crossing OG Kush and Sunset Sherbet, featuring a sweet, fruity aroma with hints of cotton candy and gas.

name: Gelato Cookies
description: Gelato Cookies is a balanced hybrid strain, also known as Gelato or Larry Bird, created by crossing Sunset Sherbet and Thin Mint Girl Scout Cookies.

grow_info.notes: According to growers, this strain produces buds that bloom in dark purple hues and are illuminated by fiery orange hairs and a shiny white coating of crystal resin.

name: Goji OG
description: Goji OG is a sativa-dominant hybrid from Bodhi Seeds, crossing Nepali OG and Snow Lotus, known for its unique berry-inspired flavor and dynamic effects.

name: Grape Diamonds
description: Grape Diamonds is a hybrid strain known for its calming, quick-hitting, buzzy high and is a phenotype of Memberberry.

name: Secret Weapon
description: Secret Weapon is a hybrid strain created by crossing Cheese Quake and White Widow, featuring 17% THC and offering a balanced experience ideal for experienced cannabis users.

name: Sunshine
description: Sunshine, a sativa strain also called Sunshine OG, is a cross of Chemdawg and Sunshine Daydream that delivers blissful, happy, and uplifting effects with a fruity flavor.

name: That Badu
description: That Badu is a vibrant, uplifting hybrid strain inspired by Grammy-winning artist Erykah Badu, featuring jewel-toned purple buds that reflect her creative and nurturing spirit.

name: Blue Widow
description: Blue Widow is a hybrid cross of Blueberry and White Widow, offering uplifting yet calming effects with a strong, sweet aroma featuring hints of sour citrus and pine.

grow_info.notes: Blue Widow plays against type, growing taller than most indicas and providing more mental, heady effects.

name: Ice Cream Sundae
description: Ice Cream Sundae is a hybrid strain with 18% THC and 1% CBG, known for its relaxing, sleepy, and happy effects, featuring limonene as its dominant terpene.

name: White Guava
description: White Guava is a hybrid strain created by crossing Stardawg and Tres Dawg, known for its 18.6% THC content, making it well-suited for experienced cannabis users.

name: ECSD
description: ECSD, a sativa, offers a fast-acting, uplifting experience with a crisp sour lemon aroma and flavor, making it popular but potent enough for new users to approach with caution.

name: Black Cherry Pie
description: Black Cherry Pie is a hybrid strain by Green Mountain Collective, known for its fruity flavor and colorful foliage featuring deep purple and jade hues, bred from Blackberry Kush and Cherry Pie genetics.

name: Banana Cream Cake
description: Banana Cream Cake is a sativa-dominant hybrid strain created by crossing Wedding Cake with Monkey Banana, offering a potent 21% THC that may be intense for novice users.

grow_info.notes: According to growers, this strain flowers into dense, light green nugs with tiny orange hairs and a coating of frosty trichomes.

name: Tres Leches
description: Tres Leches is a sativa-dominant hybrid created by crossing Koolato with Cookies and Cream, delivering uplifting and energetic effects perfect for creative thinking and productive activities.

grow_info.notes: According to growers, this strain flowers into pointed fluffy nugs with dark green foliage and topped with snowy trichomes.

name: Sour Kush
description: Sour Kush is a hybrid strain combining Sour Diesel and OG Kush, known for providing effective daytime pain relief.

name: Pineapple Chunk
description: Pineapple Chunk is a hybrid strain combining Cheese, Skunk #1, and Pineapple, delivering heavy full-body effects alongside a buzzy head high with tropical, cheesy flavors.

grow_info.notes: Yields around 450 to 550 grams per meter squaredResponds well to toppingMedium to heavy feeder

name: Guava Cake
description: Guava Cake is a hybrid strain, likely a cross of Wedding Cake, known for its calming effects that can make you feel tingly, aroused, and giggly.

name: Apple Runtz
description: Apple Runtz is a rare, THC-dominant hybrid strain combining Zkittlez and Gelato genetics, offering a fruity, candy-like flavor and aroma reminiscent of sugary Runtz candy.

name: Project 4516
description: Project 4516 is a hybrid strain known for its euphoric, creative, and energetic effects, featuring 23% THC and a dominant limonene terpene.

name: Funky Charms
description: Funky Charms is a hybrid strain created by crossing Grease Monkey and Rainbow Chip, known for its relaxing, sleepy, and euphoric effects with 18% THC.

name: Lip Smacker
description: Lip Smacker is an indica-dominant hybrid strain created by crossing Sherbert and Strawberries & Cream, featuring 18% THC and favored by experienced cannabis consumers.

name: Vanilla Kush
description: Vanilla Kush is an indica from Barney’s Farm, bred from Afghan and Kashmir strains, known for its rich, sensory experience and awarded 2nd place at the 2009 High Times Cannabis Cup.

grow_info.notes: Good for sea of green (SOG) or screen of green (SCROG) operationsStretches tall during the first 3 weeks of floweringReservoir Seeds recommends a soil pH level of 5.8 to 6.0Grows best in warm, slightly arid environments up to 88°F (31°C) and rich in CO2

name: Wasabi
description: Wasabi is a balanced hybrid strain with 50% sativa and 50% indica genetics, created by crossing Bubba Kush and Super Lemon Haze for a unique and well-rounded experience.

name: Cream Caramel
description: Cream Caramel is an indica-dominant strain known for its sweet caramel aroma, bred by Spain's Sweet Seeds from Blue Black, Maple Leaf Indica, and White Rhino, offering a rich and relaxing experience.

name: Cream
description: Cream is a hybrid strain created by crossing Wedding Cake and Gelato #33, offering a mild 14% THC content that makes it a great option for beginner cannabis users.

name: Apple Gelato
description: Apple Gelato is a hybrid strain created by crossing Sour Apple with Gelato #33, offering energizing effects that leave users feeling energetic, relaxed, and happy.

name: Lime Sorbet
description: Lime Sorbet is an indica strain created by crossing Bubba Kush with Lime Skunk, offering a unique flavor and versatile, pleasant effects.

name: Northern Lights #5
description: Northern Lights #5, an influential Indica strain, first competed in 1989 and quickly dominated the Cannabis Cup by winning in 1989, 1990, and 1992.

name: French Cookies
description: French Cookies is a rare sativa strain from Platinum Cookies, offering energizing, focused effects with a creamy cookie flavor and a subtle hint of spice.

name: Afgoo
description: Afgoo, an indica-dominant strain also called Afgooey or Afghan Goo, is known for its potent effects and may offer uplifting creativity in small doses, with roots tracing back to Afghani and Maui Haze.

name: Grape Candy
description: Grape Candy, a hybrid by I&L Genetics of Colorado, blends White Lemon and Purple Pantera to produce multi-colored purple and light green buds with a sweet grape flavor and a heavy, contented high.

name: Milk and Cookies
description: Milk and Cookies is an Indica-dominant hybrid by Exotic Genetix, created from Cookies N Cream and Triple OG, with 15% THC, making it a great option for beginner cannabis users.

name: Rocket Pop
description: Rocket Pop is a 40% sativa, 60% indica hybrid strain bred from Blueberry Cookies and Cherry OG, offering 20% THC for a balanced experience ideal for seasoned cannabis users.

name: Lemon Bars
description: Lemon Bars is a sativa strain bred by Wave Rider, known for its potent 32% THC content, making it a great choice for experienced cannabis users.

name: Mafia Funeral
description: Mafia Funeral is a hybrid strain from Compound Genetics, crossing Falcon 9 and Menthol, known for its potent, flavorful buds that deliver blissful relaxation and euphoria.

name: Snow White
description: Snow White is a 65/35 indica-dominant hybrid bred by Nirvana Seeds, featuring early, abundant resin production from its White Widow lineage and a balanced, steady effect with a flowering time of 60 to 70 days.

name: Amnesia Lemon Haze
description: Amnesia Lemon Haze is a sativa strain bred from Amnesia Haze and Lemon Skunk, featuring 20% THC and 2% CBG, making it a great choice for experienced cannabis users.

name: Jack Frost
description: Jack Frost is a potent hybrid strain created by crossing White Widow with Northern Lights #5, offering a sweet, woody flavor and uplifting effects that boost happiness, creativity, and energy.

name: Ice Pop
description: Ice Pop is a hybrid strain created by crossing Tangie and Peach Crescendo, known for its 18% THC content and appeal to experienced cannabis users.

name: Berry Runtz
description: Berry Runtz is a hybrid strain created by crossing Kushberries and White Runtz, known for its 20% THC content and popular among experienced cannabis users.

name: Glazed Donut
description: Glazed Donut is a hybrid strain combining Grape Slushie and Purple Punch, known for its sweet, doughy aroma reminiscent of a freshly baked treat and a THC content of 20%-30%.

name: Peach Cobbler
description: Peach Cobbler, a hybrid from Humboldt Seed Company, blends Apricot Papaya, Strawberry Banana, and Dream Queen to deliver a unique terpene profile with peach aromas and creamy vanilla flavors.

name: Forbidden Runtz
description: Forbidden Runtz is an indica-dominant hybrid created by crossing Forbidden Fruit and Runtz, known for its potent 26% THC content, making it ideal for experienced cannabis users.

name: Lemon Royale
description: Lemon Royale is a sativa-dominant hybrid created by crossing Lemon Tree with GMO and Triangle Kush, delivering energizing effects that leave users feeling euphoric, inspired, and clear-headed.

grow_info.notes: Growers say Lemon Royale grows in dense, lumpy buds that almost appear white due to their heavy trichome coverage.

name: Candy Jack
description: Candy Jack is a mostly sativa strain with a sweet citrus aroma from its Skunk #1 parent and delivers creative, focused effects inherited from Jack Herer.

name: Falcon 9
description: Falcon 9 is an indica-dominant strain from Exotic Genetix, blending Sunset Sherbert and Tina, known for its smooth, gassy ice cream flavor and striking dark purple buds with bright orange pistils.

name: Blackberry Moonrocks
description: Blackberry Moonrocks is a hybrid by Anesia Seeds, combining Blue Moonrock and Blackberry Kush to deliver a unique blend of lavender, blueberry, blackberry, and light citrus flavors.

name: Temptation
description: Temptation is a balanced hybrid strain, a 50/50 cross of Ice Cream Cake and Jealousy, combining the rich terpene profiles of Gelato and Wedding Cake for a complex and enjoyable experience.

name: Moon Boots
description: Moon Boots is a potent indica-dominant hybrid from Archive Seed Bank, combining the genetics of two legendary strains for a powerful and uplifting experience.

grow_info.notes: Moon Boots is ahybridweed strain made from a genetic cross between Moon Bow andWhite Tahoe Cookies. Moon Boots is 25% THC and 1% CBG, making this strain an ideal choice for more experienced cannabis consumers. Leafly customers tell us Moon Boots’ effects includeuplifted,energetic, andfocused, making it perfect for daytime activities. Medical marijuana patients often choose Moon Boots when dealing with symptoms associated withfatigue,depression, andanxiety. Bred by Archive Seed Bank, Moon Boots features flavors likepepper,tobacco, andorange. The dominant terpene of this strain iscaryophyllene. The average price of Moon Boots is unknown. If you’ve smoked, dabbed, or consumed Moon Boots, tell us about your experience by leaving a strain review.

name: Poddy Mouth
description: Poddy Mouth is a hybrid strain from Humboldt Pound Cake and Mtn Top Mint, known for its trichome-covered pods that resemble candy and THC levels of 24-30%.

name: Truffle Butter
description: Truffle Butter is an indica-dominant hybrid strain bred from Gelato and Chocolate Kush, known for its rich flavor and potency, making it a great choice for experienced cannabis users.

name: Gumball
description: Gumball is a balanced hybrid strain, a 50/50 cross of Bubblegum and Fireball, known for its pleasant and sweet flavor profile.

name: Blueberry Gumbo
description: Blueberry Gumbo is a balanced hybrid strain combining Blueberry and OG Kush genetics, offering a 50/50 sativa-indica blend with potent effects ideal for experienced users.

name: Cannatonic
description: Cannatonic is a hybrid strain high in CBD, created by crossing MK Ultra and G13 Haze, known for its short-lived, mellow, uplifting, and deeply relaxing effects.

name: Blissful Wizard
description: Blissful Wizard is a potent hybrid from The Captain’s Connection, blending Captain's Cookies and Girl Scout Cookies with rich lemon, lime, and cream flavors.

name: Bernie HanaButter
description: Bernie HanaButter is an indica strain by Cookies, blending Jet Fuel Gelato, Guava, Blue Cookies, and Oreoz, known for its rich buttery aroma and smooth effects.

name: Bubblegum Kush
description: Bubblegum Kush is an 80% indica strain from Bulldog Seeds, Netherlands, created by crossing Bubble Gum with an undisclosed Kush, known for its easy cultivation and large yields.

grow_info.notes: Yield can be expected to fall between 600 and 700 grams per square meter

name: Black Velvet
description: Black Velvet is a balanced hybrid combining The Black and Burmese Kush, offering dense purple-black buds with a fruity, citrus aroma and a blend of cerebral and physical effects.

name: Lollypop
description: Lollypop is a hybrid strain from Cinderella 99 and Romulan, featuring a fruity, spicy flavor with sour, earthy, and pine notes, and a THC content of 16-19%.

name: Purple Afghani
description: Purple Afghani is a strong, easy-to-grow Indica known for its thick, heavy buds, dark green leaves, and purple calyxes that develop during flowering, featuring a medium-high leaf-to-flower ratio and a subtle aroma.

name: Big Buddha Cheese
description: Big Buddha Cheese is a potent hybrid known for its high yields and distinctive pungent cheese-like aroma, originating from the famous UK Cheese strain bred in England in 1989.

name: Dulce De Leche
description: Dulce De Leche is a 70% indica hybrid with creamy, sweet, piney, and earthy flavors, offering a smooth and delicious experience.

name: Mazar I Sharif
description: Mazar I Sharif is a legendary indica strain from northern Afghanistan, known for its vigorous growth and ability to reach up to 4 meters tall in fertile, well-irrigated soil.

name: Heir Heads
description: Heir Heads is a hybrid strain from Apples & Bananas and Runtz, featuring vibrant purple buds with strong Gelato, diesel, and cookies terpene profiles.

name: Baklava
description: Baklava is a hybrid strain from Kosher Kush and Gelato 41, known for delivering powerful full-body relaxation and a unique, memorable experience.

name: Blue Guava
description: Blue Guava is a hybrid strain from the Zatix brand in the Bay Area, CA, created in 2023 by crossing Peach Guava with the OZ Kush project.

name: Tigerz Eye
description: Tigerz Eye is a hybrid strain by Compound Genetics, combining Jokerz31 and GastroPop to deliver ferocious THC power with a captivating appeal.

name: Caramel Cream
description: Caramel Cream is a potent indica-dominant hybrid created by crossing Royal Highness with Old School Cookies and Humboldt Reserve OG, delivering long-lasting, euphoric effects that instantly uplift your mood.

grow_info.notes: According to growers, Caramel Cream flowers into extremely sticky buds with dark green foliage, amber hairs, and crystal trichomes. This strain has an average flowering time of 60 days and easily produces an impressive bud structure.

name: Peyote Cookies
description: Peyote Cookies is an indica strain combining Peyote Purple and Cookies Kush, offering long-lasting euphoria with unique flavors of guava, vanilla, and coffee.

name: Cake Pop
description: Cake Pop is an indica-dominant hybrid created by crossing Birthday Cake and Fire OG, known for its 25% THC content and strong effects ideal for experienced users.

name: S'mores
description: S’mores is a hybrid strain created by crossing Pink Panther and Stardawg, featuring 17% THC and making it a great option for beginner cannabis users.

name: Cherry Cheesecake
description: Cherry Cheesecake is an indica-dominant strain, a cross of Kimbo Kush and Cherry Pie, known for its rich flavors and genetics popularized by Gold Seal of San Francisco.

name: Butterstuff
description: Butterstuff is a hybrid strain by TeamingWithTerps, blending Velvet Glove and Peanut Butter Breath to deliver rich, classic flavors in a smooth, mouth-watering experience.

name: Frost Flakes
description: If you’ve experienced the Frost Flakes strain through smoking, dabbing, or other methods, share your thoughts and feedback.

name: Pink Pineapple
description: Pink Pineapple is a sativa strain known for its energetic, euphoric, and uplifting effects, featuring 20% THC, 2% CBG, and myrcene as its dominant terpene.

name: Blueberry Jam
description: Blueberry Jam is a hybrid indica strain from Blueberry and Honey Dew, known for its high 30.8% THC content, making it ideal for experienced cannabis users.

name: MTF
description: MTF, also called Matanuska Thunder Fuck or Humble Warrior, is a sativa strain named after its Alaskan roots, known for its unique hybrid effects and bold character.

name: Citradelic Sunset
description: Citradelic Sunset, a hybrid by Ethos Genetics, features lime-green buds with purple hues and offers a flavorful mix of sour orange, lime, and sweet notes that will make your mouth water.

name: Cherry Z

name: Orange 43

name: Menage

name: Lemon Zkittle

name: Billy Kimber

name: Glueberry

name: Fortune Cookies

name: Pink Acai
description: Pink Acai is a balanced hybrid strain, created by crossing Pink Kush and Acai, known for its rare and exotic genetics cultivated exclusively by STIIIZY.

name: Zombie OG
description: Zombie OG is an indica that leaves you deeply relaxed and hungry, perfect for unwinding without turning you into a flesh-eating monster.

name: Garlicane
description: Garlicane is an indica-dominant hybrid bred by In House Genetics, combining GMO and Slurricane genetics with 23% THC, making it a great choice for experienced cannabis users.

name: Grape Cake

name: Blueberry Crumble

name: Piescream

name: Waffle Cone

name: Florida Kush

name: I-95

name: Strawberry OG
description: Strawberry OG is a clone-only hybrid combining a stable strawberry flavor with Bruce Banner’s strong structure, high yield, and early flowering traits.

name: Pink Panther
description: Pink Panther is a sativa-dominant hybrid with sweet terpene notes of pine and pear that delivers stimulating, heady effects and helps relieve headache pain.

name: Cherry Garcia
description: Cherry Garcia is a hybrid strain created by crossing Animal Cookies with 3x Crazy, known for its balanced effects that become more calming than energizing with continued use.

name: Pink Zushi
description: Pink Zushi is a balanced hybrid strain, created by crossing Zkittlez and Mag Landrace, known for its flavorful profile and evenly mixed 50% sativa and 50% indica effects.

name: Illemonati

name: Banana Cream Cake x Jealousy

grow_info.notes: Growers say this strain has large, dark green nugs that are covered in thick layers of trichomes.

name: Platinum Kush Breath

name: Shishkaberry

name: Liquid Imagination

name: Black Triangle

name: Purple Z

name: Chem Scout

name: Headcracker

name: Black '84

name: Chemdawg #4

grow_info.notes: Prefers moderate amounts of fertilizerMay express fruity or diesel-smellingphenotypesTrains well as a multi-branched plant or with sea of green (SOG) operationsAverage yield falls between 25-30 grams per plant

name: Purple Dream

name: Green Lantern

name: Presidential OG

grow_info.notes: Prefers a dry climate

name: Blue Diesel

name: Royal Gorilla

grow_info.notes: Growers say Royal Gorilla flowers into vivid bright green buds with a thick coating of resin. Home grow enthusiasts say this strain flowers quickly and is best grown indoors.

name: Z Cake

name: Purple Queen

name: Amaretto Sour

name: Wilson

name: Double Dream

name: Deep Fried Ice Cream
description: Deep Fried Ice Cream is a 70% indica, 30% sativa hybrid with sweet, earthy flavors complemented by minty and citrusy hints.

grow_info.notes: Growers say that Sticky Buns nugs are aromatic and extremely sticky in texture. Medical marijuana patients choose this strain to help relieve symptoms associated withheadachesandchronic stress.

name: Lemon Slush
description: Lemon Slush is a hybrid strain by Cannarado Seeds, created by crossing Grape Pie and Lemon OG, offering a mild 25% THC that makes it perfect for beginners.

name: J1
description: J1 is a popular hybrid strain, a cross of Skunk #1 and Jack Herer, known for its strong, uplifting effects and balanced high.

name: Euphoria
description: Euphoria is a sativa strain bred from Skunk genetics by Dutch Passion in the early 2000s, known for its uplifting effects and award-winning reputation.

name: French Toast
description: French Toast is an indica-dominant hybrid from Archive Seed Bank, created by crossing Paris OG and Face Off OG, offering a mild 16% THC perfect for beginner cannabis users.

name: Papaya Cake
description: Papaya Cake is a hybrid strain blending Papaya, Wedding Cake, and White OG genetics, known for its potent 24% THC and popular among experienced cannabis users.

name: Sour Jack

grow_info.notes: 10-12 weeks floweringHigh THCLow CBD

name: Yoda OG
description: Yoda OG is an indica strain descended from OG Kush, known for its chunky pale buds and strong effects that deliver deep relaxation for both mind and body.

name: Mochi Runtz

name: Blood Orange

name: Jean Guy

name: Black Tuna

name: Peanut Butter and Jelly
description: Peanut Butter and Jelly is a hybrid cannabis strain with flavors and effects that are still being explored by users.

name: Tropicana Haze
description: Tropicana Haze is a Sativa-dominant hybrid created by crossing Skunk Valley Haze and Tropicana Cookies, offering 24% THC for a balanced experience suited to both beginners and seasoned users.

name: Honey Cream

name: Mango Dream

name: Cherry Sherbet

name: Purple OG Kush

name: Gorilla OG

name: Mimosa Evo

name: Black Afghan

name: Designer Runtz

name: Wham

name: Pink Candy Kush

name: Tiramisu

name: Pistachio

name: Zombie Kush

name: Black Scotti

name: Sour Cherries

name: Cherry Do-Si-Dos

name: Sourdough Kush

name: Platinum Bubba Kush

name: Guava Dawg

name: Lato Pop

name: Orange Soda

name: Biskante

name: Sour Lemon

name: Purple Diamond

name: Hawaiian Punch

name: RS54

name: Rockstar

name: Violet Sky

name: XXX OG

name: Strawberry Milkshake

name: Tequila Sunrise

name: Dream Queen

name: Blueberry Blast

name: Cactus Cooler

name: Gelato 44
description: Gelato 44 is a hybrid strain combining Gelato genetics with an unknown variety, known for its exotic flavors and potent effects.

name: Rozé
description: Rozé is a hybrid strain created by crossing Zkittlez with an unknown strain, originating from the famed Zkittlez lineage passed down by “Gas Station Bob” to Emerald Triangle breeders of 3rd Gen Fam.

name: Special Queen #1
description: Special Queen #1 is a hybrid strain by Royal Queen Seeds, combining Power Bud and Skunk genetics for a balanced and uplifting experience.

name: RedBull

name: Mother's Milk

name: Detroit Runtz

name: Space Cookies

name: Pre-98 Bubba Kush

name: Gorilla Breath

name: Rainbow Gelato

name: Sour Banana Sherbet

name: Purple Chemdawg

name: Cake Boss

name: Shiva Skunk

grow_info.notes: Suitable for temperate, dry climates outdoorsYields typically reach up to 450g/m²Good for sea of green (SOG) setups

name: Guava Runtz
description: Guava Runtz is a hybrid strain blending Guava and Runtz genetics, offering a rare, exotic mix of fruity and gassy flavors with a mouthwatering aroma of tropical fruits and candy.

name: Truffle Monkey

name: Pie Face

name: Banana Purple Punch Auto

name: Coconut Cream

name: Ether

name: Orange Apricot
