name: Sprinkles
description: Sprinkles is a hybrid strain created by crossing Zkittlez and Titty Sprinkles, offering 24% THC and ideal for experienced cannabis users seeking a flavorful and potent experience.

name: Sour Strawberry
description: Sour Strawberry is a Hybrid by BOG Seeds that blends Sour Bubble, Strawberry Cough, Razz, and East Coast Sour Diesel, known for its high resin, and flavors of strawberries, diesel, and citrus.

name: Drip Station
description: Drip Station is a 2022 hybrid strain from Exotic Genetix, crossing Greasy Runtz with Scotty 2 Hotty.

name: Banjo
description: Banjo is a savory hybrid of Boost and Tangelo that uplifts mood with a unique aroma of grated cheese and tangerine zest, delivering a sweet, piney flavor.

name: Biker Kush
description: Biker Kush, an Indica by Karma Genetics, blends the potent flavors of Hell’s OG and Lucifer OG, honoring California cannabis heritage with its powerful and flavorful effects.

name: Zack's Cake
description: Zack's Cake is a hybrid strain known for its relaxing, happy, and euphoric effects, featuring 21% THC, 1% CBG, and a dominant limonene terpene.

name: Ripped Off Runtz
description: Ripped Off Runtz is a balanced hybrid strain, crossing Runtz and Jealousy Runtz, with 31% THC, perfect for experienced cannabis users.

name: Inzane In The Membrane
description: Inzane In The Membrane is a potent, high-yielding sativa from Ethos Genetics, featuring frosty lime-green buds with orange pistils and a loud lemon citrus aroma.

name: Where's My Bike
description: Where's My Bike, a hybrid by Karma Genetics, is a high-yielding cross of Amnesia and Biker Kush that delivers a pleasant, heady buzz with a rich blend of terpenes like caryophyllene, terpinolene, and humulene.

name: Bahama Mama
description: Bahama Mama is a sativa-dominant hybrid from Black Bananas and Tropicana Cookies, delivering a fast-acting, motivating high that helps you stay productive and tackle your to-do list.

grow_info.notes: According to growers, Bahama Mama flowers into medium-sized frosted buds with dark green, red, and purple foliage. This strain has an average flowering time of 60 days and is best grown outdoors.

name: Candy OG
description: Candy OG is a hybrid cannabis strain with flavors and effects that are still being discovered by users.

name: Banana Cream Jealousy
description: Banana Cream Jealousy is a hybrid strain combining Banana Cream Cake and Jealousy, featuring 22% THC and offering a potent experience ideal for seasoned cannabis users.

name: Tsunami
description: Tsunami is a hybrid strain combining Northern Lights and Afghani genetics, offering a strong, pungent aroma with herbal, earthy, citrus, and pine notes.

name: Purple Lemonade
description: Purple Lemonade is a hybrid cannabis strain with apricot, berry, and lemon flavors that users say inspires creativity, euphoria, and arousal.

name: Snow Cone
description: Snow Cone is a hybrid strain from 707 Seedbank, blending Snowman and 707 Chemdawg, offering sweet marshmallow, mild diesel, and citrus flavors with uplifting and enjoyable effects.

name: Donuts
description: Donuts is a balanced hybrid strain with 50% sativa and 50% indica genetics, featuring 30% THC, making it a potent choice for experienced cannabis users.

name: Wedding Gelato
description: Wedding Gelato is an indica-dominant hybrid created by crossing Wedding Cake with Gelato #33, known for its sweet flavor, smooth smoke, and uplifting effects.

name: Florida OG
description: Florida OG is a 70% indica-dominant hybrid strain created by crossing Chemdawg with Lemon Thai and Hindu Kush Pakistan, known for its classic effects and also called Crippy or Ocean Grown.

grow_info.notes: With less than ideal yields, it’s an unpopular choice for commercial grows—it’s more common to see it crossed with another strain to help increase yields. Buds are dark green in color with stark white trichomes and a dank lemon, earth, and pine aroma.

name: Miami Vice
description: Miami Vice is a balanced hybrid strain, a cross of Green Crush and Grapefruit, offering 50% sativa and 50% indica with 24.5% THC, perfect for experienced cannabis users.

name: Number 33
description: Number 33, a hybrid also called Scottie Pippen, is created by crossing Biscotti with Lemon Cherry Gelato and offers balanced effects with a distinctive flavor and aroma.

name: Cream Soda
description: Cream Soda is an indica-dominant hybrid bred by Exotic Genetix, combining Huckleberry Soda and Cookies & Cream genetics with 24% THC, perfect for experienced cannabis users.

name: Phantom OG
description: Phantom OG is an indica-dominant strain that starts with a burst of energy before delivering deep full-body relaxation.

name: Mellowz
description: Mellowz is a hybrid strain, 40% sativa and 60% indica, created by crossing Spritzer and Grape Gas, offering a mellow experience with a potent THC content around 25%.

name: Sorbet
description: Sorbet is a THC-dominant hybrid from DNA Genetics with green and purple, trichome-covered buds, believed to be a phenotype of Sunset Sherbert, though its exact genetics remain unknown.

name: Amaretto Mintz
description: Amaretto Mintz is an indica-dominant hybrid from Seed Cartel and Jay Beezo, crossing Cherry Punch and Animal Mintz, featuring dark purple buds coated in icy trichomes.

name: Sherb Crasher
description: Sherb Crasher is a hybrid strain known for its energizing, tingly, and arousing effects, featuring 25% THC, 1% CBG, and a dominant limonene terpene.

name: El Chapo OG
description: El Chapo OG is a potent California indica with dense jade popcorn buds, rich earth and pine aromas, and a shimmering coat of trichomes, making it as visually striking as it is powerful.

name: GMO Rootbeer
description: GMO Rootbeer is a hybrid strain by breeders Skunktek and Mean Gene that blends GMO Cookies with Root Beer, known for its distinct root beer aroma and high THC content.

name: Cereal a la Mode
description: Cereal a la Mode is a hybrid strain created by crossing Cereal Milk with Georgia Pie, offering a potent experience with 26% THC and 1% CBG, perfect for seasoned cannabis users.

name: Banana Split
description: Banana Split is a sativa-dominant hybrid by Crockett Farms, crossing Tangie and Banana Sherbert to deliver a clean, focused high perfect for a productive day.

name: Frosty Gelato
description: Frosty Gelato is a sativa-dominant hybrid strain created by crossing Gelato and Brain Damage, offering 16% THC and a smooth experience ideal for beginner cannabis users.

name: Sweet Tea
description: Sweet Tea is a sativa-dominant hybrid by Cookies and Seed Junkie Genetics, known for its intensely sweet flavor reminiscent of floral jasmine tea and sugared oranges.

name: AMG
description: AMG is a 70% sativa hybrid, crossing Amnesia Haze and Biker OG, delivering a citrusy, lemony aroma and a stimulating, energetic, and cerebral high.

name: Chernobyl
description: Chernobyl is a hybrid strain created by crossing Trainwreck, Jack the Ripper, and Trinity, known for its long-lasting dreamy effects, mood boost, and a distinctive lime sherbet aroma.

name: Lemon Cheesecake
description: Lemon Cheesecake is a hybrid strain combining Lemon Skunk and Cheese, known for its fragrant buds that emit a strong musky, earthy, and skunky aroma.

name: Zebra Ztripez
description: Zebra Ztripez is a balanced 50% sativa, 50% indica hybrid bred from a backcross of Z Animal, featuring 20% THC and ideal for experienced cannabis users.

name: Lemon Sherbet
description: Lemon Sherbet is a hybrid strain from 2 Scoops and Lemon Tree, featuring tart, creamy flavors and delivering euphoric, giggly effects.

name: Green Line OG
description: Green Line OG by Cresco Labs is a hybrid offspring of Lime Skunk and Ghost OG, offering a refreshing aroma of sweet citrus and forest floor with uplifting and potent effects.

name: Super Cherry
description: Super Cherry is a balanced hybrid strain with 50% sativa and 50% indica, featuring 20% THC and crafted for experienced cannabis users.

name: Cactus
description: Cactus is an indica strain bred by Jordan of the Islands, crossing Afghani and Northern Lights, featuring conic, knobby buds that emit an earthy, organic aroma.

name: Chem Cookies
description: Chem Cookies is an indica-dominant hybrid created by crossing Chemdog #4 and GSC, delivering a cerebral, euphoric high that deeply relaxes the entire body.

name: Lodi Dodi
description: Lodi Dodi is a sativa-dominant hybrid strain from Washington State, bred by The Clone Zone, known for its sweet, unique flavor and closely guarded genetics.

name: Ayahuasca Purple
description: Ayahuasca Purple is an indica-dominant strain by Barney’s Farm, blending Master Kush and Red River Delta with relaxing effects and unique hazelnut and papaya aromas, featuring deep purple foliage.

name: Purple Ice
description: Purple Ice, a slightly sativa-dominant hybrid, delivers potent, relaxing effects that help ease stress while promoting euphoria and focus, making it great for any time of day.

name: Blue Magoo
description: Blue Magoo is a hybrid clone-only cross of DJ Short Blueberry and Major League Bud, offering a flavorful blend of berry, fruity, and floral aromas and tastes.

name: Apple Mintz
description: Apple Mintz is a hybrid strain created by crossing Apple Fritter and Kush Mints, known for its relaxing, talkative, and uplifting effects with a THC content around 20%.

name: Mambo MG
description: Mambo MG is a THC-dominant hybrid from One Leg Up Cooperative, blending Platinum Romulan and New Orleans Purple to yield green and purple buds with golden hairs and a spicy, musky, skunky aroma.

name: Pineapple Runtz Cake
description: Pineapple Runtz Cake is a hybrid strain, blending 40% sativa and 60% indica genetics from Pina and Runtz Cake, offering a balanced mix of effects and flavors.

name: Purple Berry
description: Purple Berry is an indica-dominant strain blending Grandaddy Purple and Blueberry genetics, known for its dense green buds streaked with vibrant purple hues.

name: Dip N Stix
description: Dip N Stix is a sativa-dominant hybrid from Platinum and Slurricane, offering a potent, flavorful experience with a terpene profile featuring caryophyllene, limonene, and bisabolol.

name: Blue Magic
description: Blue Magic is a sativa-dominant strain bred from Blue Dream, offering high-energy effects with creamy, fruity flavors inspired by its Blueberry lineage.

name: Mochi Gelato
description: Mochi Gelato is a hybrid strain known for making users feel giggly, relaxed, and tingly.

name: Wappa
description: Wappa, a 60% indica-dominant hybrid by Paradise Seeds, offers uplifting, happy effects paired with an intense fruity flavor.

name: Hawaiian Runtz
description: Hawaiian Runtz is a sativa-dominant hybrid combining Pink Runtz and Hawaiian, delivering a balanced high that makes users feel euphoric, happy, and uplifted.

name: Marathon OG
description: Marathon OG, an indica also called Marathon Kush, is a potent cross of OG Kush that delivers euphoric and deeply relaxing effects, best suited for experienced users.

name: Beach Cake
description: Beach Cake is a hybrid strain bred from Triangle Kush and Florida Cake, crafted exclusively for Verano Reserve to deliver a consistently elevated cannabis experience.

name: Tyson
description: Tyson, an indica strain named after the legendary boxer Mike Tyson, delivers a powerful knockout experience with its strong, relaxing effects.

name: Cuban Linx
description: Cuban Linx is a hybrid strain known for boosting energy, focus, and creativity.

name: Watermelon Gusherz
description: Watermelon Gusherz is a hybrid strain blending Cocomero Gelatti and Gushers, offering a sweet, fruity flavor and relaxing effects perfect for late afternoons or evenings.

name: Hulkberry
description: Hulkberry is a 65% sativa, 35% indica hybrid strain created by crossing Strawberry Diesel and OG Kush, known for its potent 27% THC content, making it ideal for experienced cannabis users.

name: Raspberry Cough

grow_info.notes: Aroma is best brought out when grown outdoors with organic fertilizersSuitable for sea of green (SOG) method

name: Lemon Jack
description: Lemon Jack is a sativa with a potent, focused high and a distinct, chemical-like lemon aroma, earning its own respect despite its famous lineage from Jack Herer.

name: White Gold
description: White Gold is a hybrid strain created by crossing White Widow with Himalayan Gold, offering euphoric effects that enhance focus and a sweet, earthy flavor with a hint of fruitiness.

grow_info.notes: White Gold weed can take 50-65 days flowering. Growers say White Gold has dense colas that are caked in sticky resin.

name: Blue Burst
description: Blue Burst is a hybrid cannabis strain with flavors and effects that are still being explored.

name: Adios MF
description: Adios MF is a hybrid strain by Seed Junky Genetics, bred from Biscottix Sherbert and Jealousy F2, known for its strong, velvety aroma.

name: Hooch

name: Gas Station
description: Gas Station is an indica strain bred from Sour Diesel and OG Kush, known for its strong diesel aroma and crafted by Gas Station Extractions, a brand specializing in solventless concentrates.

name: Banana MAC
description: Banana MAC is an indica-dominant hybrid from Banana Kush and Miracle Alien Cookies, offering a potent 20% THC experience ideal for seasoned cannabis users.

name: Grape Gas #7
description: Grape Gas #7 is an indica-dominant strain bred from Purple Halitosis and The One, offering 22% THC and 1% CBG for a balanced experience suitable for both casual and seasoned users.

name: Grape Z

name: Kitchen Sink
description: Kitchen Sink is a balanced hybrid strain created by crossing Sundae Driver with GMO Cookies, delivering uplifting effects that keep your mind focused and your body relaxed.

name: Blueberry Space Cake
description: Blueberry Space Cake is an indica-dominant strain by Cresco Labs, blending Outer Space and Alien Dutchess genetics for a potent, heavy-hitting effect influenced by Alien OG and Trinity lineage.

name: Divorce Cake

name: Herijuana
description: Herijuana is an indica strain bred by Woodhorse Seeds, combining the Humboldt County Afghan indica Petrolia Headstash with an outdoor hybrid for a unique experience.

name: Georgia Peach
description: Georgia Peach is a hybrid strain, 30% sativa and 70% indica, created by crossing GSC and Space Jill, known for its high 29% THC content, making it suitable for experienced cannabis users.

name: Wonka Bars
description: Wonka Bars is a sativa-dominant hybrid created by crossing Garlic Cookies and Mint Chocolate Chip, offering energizing effects perfect for a lively and uplifting experience.

name: Purple Skunk
description: Purple Skunk is a sativa-dominant hybrid with skunky, earthy flowers that mature in 8-9 weeks, offering an uplifting effect and a distinctive wine-like flavor.

name: Polar Pop
description: Polar Pop is a sativa strain bred by Compound Genetics, created by crossing Gastro Pop and The Menthol, known for its high 29% THC content, making it perfect for experienced cannabis users.

name: Chili Verde
description: Chili Verde is an indica-dominant hybrid created by crossing Key Lime Pie and Lavender, offering a 21% THC content that suits experienced cannabis users.

name: Jelly Runtz
description: Jelly Runtz is a hybrid by Humboldt Seed Co. known for standing out among many Runtz variations with its consistently dank and flavorful profile.

name: Mother of Berries
description: Mother of Berries is an indica strain from Maine that delivers deep relaxation and a smooth transition into restful sleep, carrying the flavorful legacy of its Blueberry parent.

name: Sugar Black Rose
description: Sugar Black Rose is an indica-dominant hybrid created by crossing Critical Mass with Black Domina, offering a sweet flavor with hints of fruit and fresh flowers.

name: Black Garlic
description: Black Garlic is a 70% indica hybrid strain, crossing GMO and Sour Dubb, known for its potent effects and pungent, earthy, diesel aroma and flavor.

name: Sudz
description: Sudz is a balanced hybrid cannabis strain created by crossing Lemon Haze and Do-Si-Dos, combining equal parts sativa and indica genetics.

name: Double Stuffed
description: Double Stuffed is an indica-dominant hybrid by Exotic Genetix, created by crossing Platinum White and Cookies and Cream, featuring 25% THC for a balanced and potent experience.

name: Atomic
description: Atomic is a potent hybrid from Bomb Seeds, blending OG Kush, Chemdawg, and THC Bomb genetics for a powerful THC-dominant experience not suited for everyone.

name: California Octane
description: California Octane is an indica-dominant hybrid bred by Humboldt Seed Company, known for its powerful fuel and fruity aroma, created by crossing Dream Queen, I-369, and Papaya.

name: Lemon Thai
description: Lemon Thai is a sativa hybrid of Thai and Hawaiian strains, offering a creative boost and uplifting effects perfect for sparking inspiration.

name: Pie Hoe
description: Pie Hoe is a balanced hybrid from Cannarado, crossing Grape Pie and Tahoe OG, developed in Colorado and refined by Jungle Boyz in L.A. to highlight its best traits.

name: Blue Power

grow_info.notes: Yields about 250-400 grams per square meter

name: Street Tarts
description: Street Tarts is a hybrid strain by Purple City Genetics, blending Guava Tart and Street Guru genetics, known for its glittering purple buds and a strong tropical, gas, and pastry aroma.

name: Blackberry Gelato
description: Blackberry Gelato is a balanced hybrid strain combining Blackberry and Gelato genetics, known for its dense, frosty buds and a fruity, fuel-like aroma.

name: Strawberry Dream
description: Strawberry Dream is a sativa-dominant hybrid of Blue Dream and Strawberry Cough, known for its sweet strawberry aroma and uplifting, cerebral effects.

name: Ice Cream Mintz
description: Ice Cream Mintz is an indica strain bred from Ice Cream Cake and Kush Mints, known for its creamy flavor and potent effects with THC levels up to 26%.

name: Wookies
description: Wookies is a hybrid strain created by crossing Girl Scout Cookies, The White, and Chemdawg 91, known for its euphoric, relaxing effects and a flavorful, minty terpene profile that sparks creativity.

name: Mac V2
description: Mac V2 is a hybrid strain similar to MAC, featuring a different father and offering flavors that lean more toward anise, chocolate, and spruce sap instead of yogurt, berry, and citrus.

name: Triple OG
description: Triple OG is a hybrid known for its gassy aroma, quality bud structure, phenomenal yields, and additional floral and citrus notes.

name: Purple Hindu Kush
description: Purple Hindu Kush is an indica strain, a cross of Hindu Kush and Purple Afghani, known for deep relaxation and strong pain relief, featuring dense lavender flowers.

name: Beaver Cookies
description: Beaver Cookies is a hybrid strain by Elev8 Seeds, crossing GMO Cookies and Gary Payton, known for its sweet and gassy terpene profile that delivers a memorable experience.

name: Slurpie
description: Slurpie is a hybrid from West Coast Sunrise, blending Granddaddy Purple, Bubba Kush, and Sherbert, with a delicious lime and earthy aroma that’s both inviting and intoxicating.

name: Gello Shotz
description: Gello Shotz is a hybrid from Seed Junky Genetics with a lemony, tropical aroma and large green buds, perfect for welcoming warmer weather without the hangover.

name: Rainbow Cake
description: Rainbow Cake is a hybrid strain created by crossing Wedding Cake with Rainbow Belts, offering a potentially balanced and enjoyable high.

grow_info.notes: According to growers, this strain will flower into dense resin-coated buds with dark purple and green frosted foliage. Rainbow Cake has an average flowering time of 6-7 weeks and can be grown indoors and outdoors.

name: Pure Kush
description: Pure Kush is a potent indica known for its strong, pungent kush aroma and heavy sedation, making it a longtime favorite for pain relief.

grow_info.notes: Requires a dry outdoor climateBest results when plants are grown large and not confined to potsFour phenotypes, three of which typically express sativa influence while the fourth exhibits more indica-like characteristics

name: Gumdrop Haze
description: Gumdrop Haze is a unique strain that offers a memorable experience for those who have smoked, dabbed, or enjoyed it before.

name: Gas Berry
description: Gas Berry is a 70% indica, 30% sativa hybrid combining OG Kush, Blueberry, and Sour Diesel genetics, known for its pungent aroma and potent, heavy-hitting effects.

name: Garlic Drip
description: Garlic Drip is a hybrid strain from GSC and Chemdawg that offers euphoric, happy, and aroused effects, featuring 27% THC, 1% CBG, and a myrcene-dominant terpene profile.

name: Caramel Candy Kush
description: Caramel Candy Kush is an indica-dominant hybrid of Pre-98 Bubba Kush and Ms. Universe, featuring two distinct phenotypes—one Bubba-dominant and the other influenced by Ms. Universe genetics.

name: Lemon Pie
description: Lemon Pie is a sativa-dominant hybrid with dense orange hairs, offering citrus, spice, and diesel flavors that inspire relaxation and creativity with over 22% THC.

name: Mango Mintality
description: Mango Mintality is a hybrid strain combining Gush Mints and Mango Haze genetics, offering a potent 27% THC content ideal for experienced cannabis users.

name: Lobster Butter
description: Lobster Butter is a balanced hybrid strain, combining Butter OG and Peanut Butter Souffle genetics with 25% THC, perfect for experienced cannabis users.

name: Grandpa's Cookies
description: Grandpa's Cookies is a balanced hybrid strain, a cross of Grandpa’s Stash and Ethos Cookies, featuring a complex flavor blend of skunk and pine.

name: Pink Gas
description: Pink Gas is a hybrid strain known for its 23% THC and myrcene-rich profile, often making users feel hungry, euphoric, and happy.

name: Sunshine #4
description: Sunshine #4 is an award-winning hybrid by Bodhi Seeds, blending Chemdawg 4 and Sunshine Daydream genetics, and won Best Hybrid Flower at the 2015 High Times Medical Cup in Michigan.

name: Bodhi's Charms
description: Bodhi's Charms is a potent hybrid by Bodhi Seeds, created by crossing The White with Appalachia, delivering euphoric effects that may boost creativity and inspire uplifting feelings.

name: King Tut
description: King Tut is a potent sativa strain, a cross of AK-47, known for its uplifting effects that boost creativity and make it perfect for social outings.

grow_info.notes: Can be placed close togetherSensitive to high humidity and fungusGreat mother plant, with close compact branches

name: Tropical Z
description: Tropical Z is a hybrid strain by Connected Cannabis, offering a tropical, citrus, woodsy, and sweet flavor with a terpene blend of limonene, myrcene, and caryophyllene for a vacation-like experience.

name: Grape Gushers
description: Grape Gushers is a hybrid by High Grade Farms, crossing GMO and Gelato, known for its strong grape aroma, creamy mouthfeel, gassy berry notes, and dense deep purple buds.

name: The Bling
description: The Bling is a balanced hybrid strain, a cross of Humboldt Frost, Reserve OG, and Humboldt Gelato, known for its green and purple buds covered in sparkling trichomes.

name: Dior
description: Dior is a luxurious hybrid cannabis strain by Fountainhead Seeds, featuring deep violet and neon green buds, bred from Gelato 41 x OG and Headlights genetics.

name: Lemongrass
description: Lemongrass is a hybrid strain by Humboldt Seed Company, created by crossing Lemon KushBx5 and HumboldtGelatoBx3, known for its vigorous growth and high performance.

name: Peach OG
description: Peach OG is a hybrid strain known for its energetic, creative, and focused effects, featuring 18% THC and a dominant limonene terpene.

name: Rainbow Road
description: Rainbow Road is a 60% sativa, 40% indica hybrid strain created by crossing Master Kush and Hindu Kush, offering 22% THC for a potent experience ideal for seasoned cannabis users.

name: Disco
description: Disco is a hybrid cannabis strain by Fountainhead Seeds, crossing Wedding Cake and Lime Vines, featuring vibrant green and purple buds with a prismatic shine reminiscent of a disco ball.

name: Lemon Berry Candy OG
description: Lemon Berry Candy OG is a hybrid from Ethos Genetics, blending Las Vegas Lemon Skunk and Lemon Grape Bubba Temple, featuring trichome-rich buds and sharp, sweet citrus flavors perfect for concentrate enthusiasts.

name: Pac Man
description: Pac Man is a hybrid strain created by Cookies and Adam Pacman Jones, featuring a sweet, spicy, and dank aroma with GSC family terpenes from a Seed Junky Genetics cross of Biscottix Jealousy F2.

name: Zkittlez Auto
description: Zkittlez Auto is a hybrid autoflowering cannabis strain by Fast Buds, known for its stable growth, consistent THC levels, and large lime green buds covered in trichomes.

name: Happy Hour
description: Happy Hour is a balanced hybrid strain with sweet, earthy, fruity, and spicy flavors, offering a festive and uplifting experience.

name: Cherry Gorilla
description: Cherry Gorilla is a hybrid strain created by crossing GG4 and Black Cherry Pie, known for its calming effects rather than energizing sensations.

grow_info.notes: According to growers, this strain flowers into dense nugs with green foliage and peek-a-boo shades of magenta. Cherry Gorilla has an average flowering time of 8-9 weeks and produces a large yield.

name: Star Dust OG
description: Star Dust OG is an indica strain created by crossing Chem Dog, Key Lime Pie, and Northern Lights, delivering a potent 21% THC content ideal for experienced cannabis users.

name: Guava Tartz
description: Guava Tartz is a 60% sativa, 40% indica hybrid from Crockett Family Farms, bred by crossing Apple Tartz and Crockett's Dawg for a balanced and flavorful experience.

name: Pennywise
description: Pennywise is a high-CBD indica cross of Harlequin and Jack the Ripper, featuring four phenotypes with unique bud shapes inspired by the Stephen King character.

grow_info.notes: May express one of four different phenotypes, differing only in shape and structureResistant to mildewTGA Genetics recommends topping once

name: Orange Kush Cake
description: Orange Kush Cake is a hybrid strain with long calyxes and buds that resemble hands reaching for the sun, created by crossing Wedding Cake x Jilly Bean with Sour Tangie x Roze Zkittlez x OG Eddy Lepp.

name: Zeclair
description: Zeclair is a hybrid strain by Umami Seed Co and Watson Supply, blending Cold Heat and Zonuts genetics to deliver sweet vanilla, diesel flavors, and a visually sparkling, candy-like appeal.

name: Strawberry Cookies

grow_info.notes: According to growers, Strawberry Cookies flowers into pointy nugs with vibrant green foliage covered with white patches of thick trichomes. Strawberry Cookies has an average flowering time of 63 days and will produce a medium yield.

name: Grape Gelato
description: Grape Gelato is a 60% indica, 40% sativa hybrid combining Grape Kush and Gelato 33, known for its potent effects and spicy, fruity flavor.

name: Red Headed Stranger
description: Red Headed Stranger is an energizing sativa strain, a cross of Tom Hill’s Haze and William’s Wonder, delivering a vibrant cerebral boost inspired by Willie Nelson’s 1975 album.

name: Purple Crack
description: Purple Crack is a hybrid strain, also called Purple Green Crack, believed to be a cross between Green Crack genetics and a Blackwater male.

name: The Don Mega
description: The Don Mega is a hybrid cannabis strain with unique flavors and effects that are still being explored by users.

name: Channel
description: Channel is a hybrid strain bred by Medical Seeds Co., known for its unique flavors and effects that are still being explored by users.

name: The Menthol
description: The Menthol is a hybrid cannabis strain with flavors and effects that are still being explored.

name: Lemon Bean
description: Lemon Bean is a sativa strain created by crossing Lemon Tree and Eddy Lepp, known for its 21% THC content and effects favored by experienced cannabis users.

name: Garlic Icing
description: Garlic Icing is a hybrid strain from GMO and Papaya, offering a smooth, creamy smoke that delivers balanced relaxation with mental stimulation and soothing body relief.

name: Cement Shoes
description: Cement Shoes is a potent indica strain created by crossing Animal Cookies, OGKB, and Wet Dream, delivering heavy, grounding effects that live up to its name.

name: Marmalade
description: Marmalade is a hybrid by Solstice, bred from Blueberry Cheesecake and Sour Tsunami, offering sweet wildflower honey and fresh berry flavors with balanced effects.

name: Strawberry Jam
description: Strawberry Jam is a balanced hybrid strain blending Mexican Ruderalis, Blueberry Indica, and Jamaican landrace genetics for a unique and exotic experience.

name: Butterscotch

name: Space Mints
description: Space Mints is a hybrid strain from Space Candy and Alien Mints, offering a sweet and sour flavor with a euphoric, relaxing high and THC levels between 20-25%.

name: Dark Matter
description: Dark Matter is a hybrid strain created by crossing Cherry Thunderfuck and Rusty Haze, featuring 23% THC and 2% CBG, making it perfect for experienced cannabis users.

name: Bubba OG
description: Bubba OG, an indica strain created by crossing Pre-98 Bubba Kush with Ghost OG, is a potent, sweet-smelling choice perfect for relaxing and socializing.

name: White Berry

grow_info.notes: 63-72 days flowering

name: Blue Cherry Gelato
description: Blue Cherry Gelato is an indica hybrid from THC Design featuring blue-tinted buds and a unique berry and dough flavor profile.

name: White Buffalo
description: White Buffalo is a sativa strain created by crossing Romulan, Blackberry Kush, and Bay 11, delivering uplifting, active, and euphoric effects.

grow_info.notes: White Buffalo weed has a 2 to 4 week vegetative period. Expect yields of 1.5 to 2 lbs. per plant outdoors and yields of 1.75 to 2 lbs. per 1000 watts indoors.

name: Blue Hawaiian
description: Blue Hawaiian is a hybrid with light green to orange buds, vibrant orange and red hairs, and sparkling trichomes, offering a smooth, fruity experience from its Blueberry and Hawaiian Sativa lineage.

name: Electric Kool Aid
description: Electric Kool Aid is a 60/40 sativa-dominant hybrid bred from Purple Diesel and Cherry Pie, offering uplifting, inspiring effects that relax the body, making it ideal for daytime use.

name: GMO Pie
description: GMO Pie is a balanced hybrid strain, created by crossing GMO and Georgia Pie, offering 21% THC for experienced cannabis users.

name: Notorious THC
description: Notorious THC is an indica-dominant hybrid bred from Humboldt OG and Caramel Cream, offering 19% THC and a smooth experience ideal for beginner cannabis users.

name: Blueberry Lemonade
description: Blueberry Lemonade is a 70% indica, 30% sativa hybrid strain combining Blueberry Fuel and Lemon Skunk genetics, offering a balanced experience ideal for seasoned cannabis users.

name: Grandpa’s Stash
description: Grandpa’s Stash is a hybrid strain combining 1994 Super Skunk, 1992 OG Kush, and a 1970s Afghan Kush cut, offering a balanced experience with 11% THC ideal for seasoned users.

name: Tahiti Lime
description: Tahiti Lime is a sativa-dominant hybrid created by crossing Dosidos and Zkittlez, offering 16% THC and 1% CBD, making it a great choice for experienced cannabis users.

name: Stay Puft
description: Stay Puft is a hybrid strain by Compound Genetics, blending Marshmallow OG and Grape Gasoline with sweet vanilla, marshmallow, and candy flavors, plus hints of diesel, grapes, and honey.

name: Gas Runtz
description: Gas Runtz is a hybrid strain bred from Runtz and Gas House OG, known for its potent effects and unique, flavorful aroma.

name: Private Reserve
description: Private Reserve is a hybrid strain known for its 19% THC and myrcene-rich profile, offering focused, energetic, and creative effects.

name: Gas Monkey
description: Gas Monkey is a rare indica-dominant hybrid created by crossing Grease Monkey with Gas, offering a buzzy head high that leads to deep mental relaxation and a strong couch-lock effect.

name: Blue Rhino
description: Blue Rhino is a hybrid strain combining Blueberry and White Rhino, known for its unique fruity aroma with skunky undertones and large, impressive flowers favored by growers.

name: Nebula
description: Nebula, a hybrid bred by Paradise Seeds in 1996, delivers an intense, almost psychedelic head and body buzz with buds that sparkle like a starcloud coated in THC.

name: Big Head
description: Big Head is a hybrid strain created by crossing Heatlocker and Sherbhead, known for its flavorful profile and potent effects with 20-25% THC.

name: Collins Ave
description: Collins Ave is a balanced hybrid by Cookies and Seed Junkie Genetics with a tart cream aroma and a bright, citrusy sweet cream flavor that delivers a smooth, uplifting experience.

name: Unicornz
description: Unicornz is a hybrid strain from THC Design’s 2022 Pheno Hunt, crossing Unicorn Poop with Pineapple Pezz and Project 4516, featuring genetics from GMO, OG, OGKB, and Cherry.

name: Blueberry Gelato
description: Blueberry Gelato is an indica-dominant hybrid strain created by crossing Thin Mint Girl Scout Cookies with Blueberry, offering a balanced experience perfect for beginners.

name: Strawberry Milk
description: Strawberry Milk is a hybrid strain known for its energetic, focused, and talkative effects, featuring 10% CBD, 7% THC, and caryophyllene as its dominant terpene.

name: Ambrosia
description: Ambrosia, a hybrid born from God Bud and Burmese, delivers an almost instant full-body high with uplifting sativa effects inherited from its Burmese parent.

name: Chemmy Jones
description: Chemmy Jones is a hybrid strain by Connoisseur Genetics, blending Chemdawg and Casey Jones genetics to deliver an uplifting and revitalizing experience.

name: Sour Bubble
description: Sour Bubble is an indica bred by B.O.G. Seeds with sweet, fruity aroma and diesel undertones, offering sticky buds and relaxing, uplifting effects.

grow_info.notes: Indoor or outdoor grows are recommended for intermediate growers, who can expect moderate grows with a flowering time between 7 and 8 weeks.

name: Willy Wonka
description: Willy Wonka is a sativa strain that earned third place in the concentrates category at the 2014 Denver Cannabis Cup.

name: Hell's OG
description: Hell's OG is an indica-dominant hybrid believed to combine OG Kush and Blackberry genetics, with rumored origins tied to Southern California biker culture.

name: Hawaiian Snowcone
description: Hawaiian Snowcone is a hybrid strain blending Zkittlez, Lemon Cherry Gelato, and Tiki Madman's Hawaiian Plushers, offering a tropical aroma that recalls the essence of Island Snow Hawaii in Kailua.

name: Biscotti Cake
description: Biscotti Cake is a hybrid strain known for making users feel energetic, giggly, and happy.

name: Cherry Fritter
description: Cherry Fritter is a hybrid strain created by crossing Cherry Pie and Apple Fritter, known for its high THC content and balanced effects, making it popular among experienced cannabis users.

name: Super Jack
description: Super Jack is a sativa strain blending Super Silver Haze and Jack Herer, offering a sweet, spiced flavor with a rich, buttery aroma and uplifting, energizing effects.

name: Stank Breath
description: Stank Breath is a hybrid strain known for its 23% THC and caryophyllene terpene, offering a balanced experience that makes users feel hungry, relaxed, and energetic.

name: Scotty 2 Hotty
description: Scotty 2 Hotty is an indica-dominant hybrid created by crossing Biscotti with Rainbow Chip, offering relaxing and euphoric effects with dense olive and fern green buds.

name: Rainbows and Cherries
description: Rainbows and Cherries is a sativa-dominant hybrid (70% sativa, 30% indica) created by crossing Cherry Thai and Rainbow SS OG, known for its rare and exotic genetics.

name: Blue Gummies
description: Blue Gummies is an indica strain by Los Exotics, known for its exotic genetics and potent effects with a high THC content of 31.5%.

name: Pop Rocks
description: Pop Rocks is an Indica strain by Seed Junky Genetics, created by crossing LA Pop Rocks with Magic Marker, known for its unique effects and characteristics.

name: Mimosa Punch
description: Mimosa Punch is a hybrid strain with 35% sativa and 65% indica, combining Mimosa and Orange Punch genetics for a balanced experience with 20% THC, perfect for seasoned cannabis users.

name: Caribbean Breeze
description: Caribbean Breeze is a 60% sativa hybrid cross of Alien Orange Cookies and Sunset Sherbert, delivering a tropical, refreshing, and euphoric high.

name: God Bud
description: God Bud is an indica strain created by crossing Hawaiian with Purple Skunk, delivering a potent, sedating high and tropical fruit flavors with subtle undertones.

name: Chocolate Mint OG
description: Chocolate Mint OG is a hybrid by Humboldt Seed Organization, crossing Emerald OG with Grandaddy Purple to produce dense buds with rich, deep flavors and aromas.

name: Future
description: Future, a hybrid by Exotic Genetix, combines Gorilla Glue #4 and Starfighter F2 to deliver potent euphoria that uplifts the mind and relaxes the body.

name: Gold Leaf
description: Gold Leaf is a rare indica-dominant hybrid that delivers fast-acting, euphoric, and uplifting effects, inspiring creativity with just one toke.

name: Gaschata
description: Gaschata is a 60% sativa, 40% indica hybrid strain bred from Horchata and Grape Gasoline, known for its 23% THC content, making it ideal for experienced cannabis users.

name: Orange Cake
description: Orange Cake is an indica-dominant hybrid created by crossing California Orange with Mimosa, delivering heady, hazy effects that leave users in a blissful state.

grow_info.notes: Growers say Orange Cake comes in tall, fluffy buds with yellow and green foliage contrasted by bright orange hairs.

name: Formula One
description: Formula One is a hybrid by Aficionado Seeds, crossing Grape Pie and Testarossa to enhance potency, yield, and resin, delivering a complex and flavorful experience.

name: Windu
description: Windu is a hybrid cannabis strain from Wizard Trees in Southern California, created by crossing RS-11 with Skywalker OG, often turning purple like Mace Windu’s lightsaber.

name: Mandarin Kush
description: Mandarin Kush is a hybrid strain combining Ethos Genetics’ Mandarin Sunset with OG Kush and Master Kush, producing dense, flavorful buds with a classic Kush aroma.

name: Sugar Plum
description: Sugar Plum, a sativa from Stoney Girl Gardens bred by crossing Berkeley Blues and Hawaiian Haze Plum, offers tropical and earthy flavors with hard-hitting, long-lasting cerebral effects.

name: Pineapple Trainwreck
description: Pineapple Trainwreck is a happy sativa hybrid blending Pineapple Express’s clear-headed effects with Trainwreck’s pain relief, featuring an earthy aroma and fruity flavor.

name: Lemon Cake x SOGA
description: Lemon Cake x SOGA is a hybrid strain with a 3:1 THC to CBD ratio, offering flavors of lemon frosting and floral cherry.

name: Puro Loco
description: Puro Loco is a rare hybrid strain, a 50/50 sativa-indica cross of Papaya and Moonbow #75, known for its potent effects and one of the highest terpene profiles on the market.

name: Cold Creek Kush
description: Cold Creek Kush is an indica-dominant hybrid from T.H. Seeds, blending MK Ultra and Chemdawg 91, known for its strong effects and award-winning legacy.

name: DelaHaze
description: DelaHaze, a 70% sativa from Paradise Seeds, combines Mango Haze and California Lemon Skunk genetics to deliver energetic effects and impressive yields.

grow_info.notes: Yields about 500 grams per square meter indoorsYields more than 1000 grams per plant outdoorsOutdoor gardens tend to thrive between 45 degrees north and south latitudesReduce unruly height by inducing flowering cycle a week early

name: Daily Grape
description: Daily Grape is a hybrid strain by Street Lawyer Services, bred from Granddaddy Purple and Sour Diesel, known for its potent 25-30% THC content and flavorful, enjoyable effects.

name: Frosted Cake
description: Frosted Cake is a hybrid strain created by crossing Strawberry Shortcake and Jungle Cake, known for its relaxing effects that can induce hunger and sleepiness.

name: Fish Scale
description: Fish Scale is an indica-dominant hybrid created by crossing Gelatti and The Menthol, known for its 25% THC content and appeal to experienced cannabis users.

name: Honeycomb
description: Honeycomb is a hybrid cannabis strain bred by Dewey Cannabis in 2022, blending the skunky glue terpenes of Original Glue with the sweet doughy notes of Dosidos for a sticky, flavorful experience.

name: Blackwater
description: Blackwater is an indica strain created by crossing Mendo Purps with San Fernando Valley OG Kush, delivering mellow effects that gradually melt through your body for a classic head-to-toe euphoria.

name: Cherry Biscotti
description: Cherry Biscotti is a hybrid strain known for its rich, sweet flavors and balanced effects that appeal to both new and experienced users.

name: Gelato Kush
description: Gelato Kush is a cannabis strain known for making users feel happy, energetic, and euphoric.

name: Area 41
description: Area 41 is a hybrid from Alien Labs that blends Lemon Fuel OG and Gelato 41, offering lemon and earthy flavors with creamy berry notes and uplifting, high-THC effects perfect for a productive afternoon.

name: Sour Chem
description: Sour Chem is a sativa-dominant hybrid from Reservoir Seeds that blends Chemdog and Sour Diesel genetics, delivering a sharp, sour flavor with energizing effects.

name: Darth Vader OG
description: Darth Vader OG is a heavy indica with violet and forest green buds, delivering deep body relaxation and sleepiness for a truly powerful experience.

name: Supersonic
description: Supersonic is a sativa-dominant hybrid with dense olive green buds flecked with rusty red and a frosty coating, bred from Quantum Kush and Snow Lotus.

name: Oreo Runtz
description: Oreo Runtz is a hybrid strain combining Oreoz and Runtz, offering a sweet, creamy flavor and aroma reminiscent of Oreo cookies with hints of diesel and vanilla.

name: Galactic Grape
description: Galactic Grape is a balanced hybrid combining Grape Diamonds and Stardawg IX, offering a fruity, gassy flavor and aroma that’s sure to delight the senses.

name: Astro Pop
description: Astro Pop is a rare hybrid (30% sativa, 70% indica) blending Apples and Bananas with Grape Gasoline, delivering a spicy, fruity flavor with subtle kerosene notes.

name: Mojito
description: Mojito is a sativa-dominant hybrid created by crossing Orange Blossom Trail with Limegerian, offering relaxing effects that gradually shift into a gentle, cerebral body high.

grow_info.notes: Growers say this strain features dense, green foliage covered in burnt orange hairs. Mojito was originally bred by Swamp Boys Seeds.

name: Mr Nasty
description: Mr Nasty, an indica from Exotic Genetix, blends GMO and Grease Monkey for a high-THC, savory smoke known for its pungent skunky garlic aroma favored by Maine connoisseurs.

name: Red Dragon
description: Red Dragon is a hybrid strain combining South American and Afghani genetics, known for its happy, uplifting effects and sweet, fruity aroma, though it may cause paranoia in some users.

grow_info.notes: Growers say Red Dragon is best grown indoors and has a flowering time of 8-10 weeks.

name: Y Griega
description: Y Griega, an 80% sativa cross of Amnesia Haze and Kali, is an energizing strain with a sweet floral and citrus aroma, known for its large, resin-coated buds on tall stalks.

grow_info.notes: ﻿Growers won’t be disappointed with Y Griega’s yields, but its 85 to 95-day flowering time requires some devotion and patience.

name: Funnel Cake
description: Funnel Cake is a hybrid cannabis strain with flavors and effects that are still being explored.

name: Grandi Candi
description: Grandi Candi is a balanced hybrid from Oakland’s Grandiflora Genetics, blending Lemon Cherry Gelatox (E85 x Doggie Bag) for a sweet, satisfying smoke that won’t rot your teeth.

name: Forum Cut Cookies
description: Forum Cut Cookies is a hybrid strain, an original cutting of GSC, known for its dense purple buds covered in trichomes, bred from OG Kush and F1 Durb by Jigga.

name: Mob Boss
description: Mob Boss is a sativa-dominant hybrid from California, created by crossing Chemdawg and Tang Tang, known for its heavy resin production and strong effects.

grow_info.notes: High calyx-to-leaf ratio makes for easy trimmingGrows best as a multi-branch plantDoes well with moderate to heavy nutrientsYields typically fall between 400-500g/m²

name: Flan
description: Flan is a balanced 50/50 hybrid strain, a cross between Mochi and Dosidos, featuring a creamy, gassy aroma with sweet, earthy, and berry notes.

name: Lime Haze
description: Lime Haze is a sativa strain created by crossing Haze and Blue Lime Pie, offering a balanced 19% THC ideal for beginners seeking uplifting and energizing effects.

name: Ghost Rider OG
description: Ghost Rider OG is an indica-dominant strain blending Karma’s Biker Kush and The White, delivering dense buds and a powerful, relaxing effect.

name: Purple Sherbet
description: Purple Sherbet is an indica-dominant hybrid created by crossing Purple Kush with Sunset Sherbet, featuring vibrant violet and olive green buds coated in shimmering trichomes.

name: Granimals
description: Granimals is a potent indica strain created by crossing Grape Pie with Animal Cookies, delivering calming, euphoric effects and a tingling full-body high, perfect for winding down.

name: Coffee Creamer
description: Coffee Creamer is a balanced hybrid strain created by crossing Cookies and Cream with Colombian Gold, combining both indica and sativa qualities.

name: Z'Lato
description: Z'Lato is a hybrid strain known for making users feel uplifted, relaxed, and euphoric.

name: Tokyo Snow
description: Tokyo Snow is a rare hybrid strain by Compound Genetics, created from Hibachi Supreme and The Menthol, known for its unique flavor and exclusive availability at MFUSED in Washington.

name: Gorilla Pie
description: Gorilla Pie is a hybrid strain created by crossing Gorilla Glue #4 and Jelly Pie, offering a potent 21% THC content ideal for experienced cannabis users.

name: Galactic Glue
description: Galactic Glue is a hybrid strain from GG4 and Grape Gobstopper Kush, known for its 16% THC and pinene-rich aroma, delivering euphoric, talkative, and arousing effects.

name: Pink Sherb
description: Pink Sherb is a hybrid strain by Karma Genetics, bred from Sherb IX and Pink Runtz, known for its vibrant pink, purple, and green buds and a rich, sherbet-inspired flavor.

name: Animal Tree
description: Animal Tree is a rare, THC-dominant hybrid created by crossing Lemon Tree and Animal Mints Bx1, known for its potent effects best suited for experienced users.

name: Sharklato
description: Sharklato is a hybrid strain created by crossing Zkittlez and Gelato, known as Yung Marley’s personal cut of Runtz, with 20% THC, making it suitable for both beginners and experienced users.

name: Somango
description: Somango, an indica from Soma Seeds, is a 75% indica strain bred by crossing Jack Herer, Super Skunk, and Big Skunk Korean, known for its fruity mango aroma and relaxing effects.

name: Super Cheese
description: Super Cheese, an Indica bred by Positronics, is a nostalgic strain inspired by the classic Amsterdam coffee shop genetics of the late 1980s, created by crossing Cheese genetics with another variety.

name: Blueberry Cruffin
description: Blueberry Cruffin is an indica-dominant hybrid bred by Backpackboyz, combining Blue Sherbert and Zkittlez genetics for a flavorful, potent experience with 23% THC.

name: Fire Cookies
description: Fire Cookies is a hybrid strain known for its creative, talkative, and uplifting effects, featuring 21% THC, 1% CBG, and a dominant myrcene terpene profile.

name: Orange Punch
description: Orange Punch is a hybrid strain known for boosting energy, enhancing focus, and sparking giggles.

name: Cherry Cake
description: Cherry Cake is a sativa-dominant hybrid created by crossing CTF with NorCal Goo, known for its energizing effects and uplifting experience.

name: Limelight
description: Limelight is a vibrant hybrid cannabis strain by Kali Grown Seeds, blending Key Lime Pie, Lemon Tree, and Kali Grown OG for a bright citrus aroma and flavorful experience.

name: Peanut Butter Cookies
description: Peanut Butter Cookies is an indica-dominant hybrid strain created by crossing Girl Scout Cookies with Peanut Butter Breath, known for its rich, nutty flavor and balanced effects.

grow_info.notes: According to growers, this strain flowers into pointed nugs with bright green foliage and glittering trichomes that appear gold in the light.

name: Fiji Sunset
description: Fiji Sunset is a balanced hybrid strain, blending Glazed Apricot Gelato and Grape Gasoline genetics, known for its sweet, earthy grape flavor with fruity and gassy notes.

name: Cali Gas
description: Cali Gas is a hybrid strain created by crossing P Star OG and Lemon Crush, offering a potent 33% THC for experienced cannabis users.

name: Peach Kush
description: Peach Kush is a hybrid strain known for its energetic, creative, and happy effects, featuring 24% THC, 1% CBG, and myrcene as its dominant terpene.

name: Slushie
description: Slushie is a balanced hybrid strain, a 50/50 cross of Snowman and Papaya, known for its 20% THC content, making it perfect for experienced cannabis users.

name: Carbon Candy
description: Carbon Candy is a balanced 50/50 hybrid strain from Good Day Farm, created by crossing Carbon Fiber and Gushers.

name: 8 Bagel
description: 8 Bagel is a 70% indica, 30% sativa hybrid strain by Cresco Labs, created by crossing GMO and Project 4516 for a potent and high-quality experience.

name: Washington Apple
description: Washington Apple is an indica strain created by crossing Pez and Ortega, known for its relaxing, hunger-inducing, and mood-boosting effects.

name: F1
description: F1 is a sativa bred by Bay Area’s Jigga, named for its fast, soaring effects, and was crossed with Durban to create F1 Durb and the GSC strain.

name: Tangerine Haze
description: Tangerine Haze is a sativa-dominant hybrid known for its distinct citrus aroma and flavor, originating from the Netherlands as a clone-only cross of G13 Haze and NYC Diesel.

name: FLH
description: FLH is an indica-dominant hybrid strain with a delicious aroma blending grapefruit and blueberry notes, offering a flavorful and fragrant experience.

name: Squirt
description: Squirt is a sativa-dominant hybrid by Humboldt Seeds Company, created by crossing Tangie with Blueberry Muffin, known for its fantastic and distinct aroma.

grow_info.notes: Growers say Squirt has purple and green buds.

name: Green Kush
description: Green Kush, an indica strain bred from Green Crack and Purple Kush, features dense buds with orange hairs and a sweet pine aroma, delivering an uplifting cerebral high that gradually shifts to a deep, relaxing body sensation.

name: Apple Mac
description: Apple Mac is a hybrid strain created by crossing MAC 1 and Trophy Wife, known for its balanced effects and 29% THC, making it a great choice for beginner cannabis users.

name: GG5
description: GG5, a hybrid by GG Strains, is a powerful cross of Sister Glue (GG1) and Original Glue (GG4), delivering strong, true-to-name effects.

name: Burmese Kush
description: Burmese Kush is a hybrid bred by T.H. Seeds with OG Kush genetics, featuring dark green buds, a piney aroma, sweet aftertaste, and delivering a calm, mellow effect that builds slowly.

grow_info.notes: Growth can be slow to start, so Burmese Kush is best for indoor conditions where growth speeds up.Flowers in 7-8 weeksYield can be expected to fall between 600 and 700 grams per square meter

name: Milk Bone
description: Milk Bone is a hybrid strain by Jungle Boys, created from GSC and Stardawg genetics, known for its 23% THC and ideal for experienced cannabis consumers.

name: Peanut Butter Gelato
description: Peanut Butter Gelato is a hybrid strain created by crossing Peanut Butter Cookies, Starfighter, Strawberry Cough, and Gelato, known for its balanced effects and 21% THC.

name: GMO Z
description: GMO Z, a hybrid from Ethos Genetics crossing GMO Cookies and The Original ZxOG Kush, delivers an intense, heavy high ideal for relaxing late-night sessions on your bed or couch.

name: Glazed Apricot Gelato
description: Glazed Apricot Gelato is a sativa-dominant hybrid from Gelato and Legend Orange Apricot, bred by Glass House Farms with 18% THC, perfect for beginners seeking a balanced and flavorful experience.

name: Gorilla Runtz
description: Gorilla Runtz is a balanced hybrid strain, combining GG4 and Bubba Runtz genetics, with 24% THC, perfect for experienced cannabis users.

name: Orange Tree
description: Orange Tree is a hybrid strain by Greenline, crossing 24k Gold and Orange Valley OG, known for its bold, sweet orange flavors that delight citrus lovers.

name: Space Monkey
description: Space Monkey is an indica-dominant hybrid created by crossing Gorilla Glue and Wookie #15, featuring a pungent, funky, sour, and dank aroma with hints of sweet lavender and bright orange-red hairs.

name: Banana Jelly
description: Banana Jelly is an indica-dominant hybrid from Seed Junky Genetics, created by crossing Banana Cream and Jealousy for a potent and flavorful experience.

name: Black Out
description: Black Out is an indica-dominant hybrid bred by Archive Seed Bank, combining The Black and Face Off OG genetics to create a dense, compact strain with striking purple hues.

name: Alien Technology
description: Alien Technology, also called Alien Tech, is an indica strain bred from select seeds obtained by breeder OBSoul33t, with limited information available about its origins.

name: Candy Chrome
description: Candy Chrome is a hybrid strain known for boosting creativity, energy, and arousal.

name: Whitethorn Rose
description: Whitethorn Rose is a hybrid cannabis strain from California’s Huckleberry Hill Farms, bred by crossing Paradise Punch and Lemon OG for a unique and flavorful experience.

name: Humboldt Dream
description: Humboldt Dream, an Indica by Humboldt Seeds, blends Purple Panty Dropper’s relaxing body high with Blue Dream’s uplifting effects to create a hazy, mentally aloof experience.

name: Cake Bomb
description: Cake Bomb is a potent indica strain, a cross of Do-Si-Dos and PCS1, known for its sweet, gassy aroma and powerful effects.

name: Ya Hemi
description: Ya Hemi is a hybrid strain created by crossing Melonatta and Project 4516, known for its 21% THC content, making it a great choice for experienced cannabis users.

name: Purple MAC
description: Purple MAC is a hybrid strain by Purple City Genetics, blending MAC and Purple Punch genetics to deliver a potent 21% THC experience ideal for seasoned cannabis users.

name: Dark Star
description: Dark Star is an indica strain that delivers a deep, relaxing body sensation paired with a heavy, calming cerebral effect.

grow_info.notes: This strain comes as a challenge to many growers with its slow, 10-week flowering period. Its sour-smelling buds are dense and compact, ornamented with crystals and copper hairs.

name: White Rainbow
description: White Rainbow is a 60% sativa, 40% indica hybrid combining White Widow and Sour Diesel genetics for a balanced and enjoyable cannabis experience.

name: King Sherb
description: King Sherb is a hybrid indica strain by In House Genetics, bred from OGKB and Blue Sherb, known for its potent effects and pungent earthy, spicy aroma.

name: Lemon Sour Diesel
description: Lemon Sour Diesel is a sativa-dominant hybrid by Green Lantern Seeds, created by crossing Lost Coast OG and California Sour, offering a balanced 16% THC ideal for beginners.

name: Race Fuel OG
description: Race Fuel OG, a potent hybrid by Archive Seeds, combines the gassy, earthy diesel aroma of the “High Octane” OG Kush phenotype with Face Off OG genetics for a powerful, fuel-inspired experience.

name: Ice Wine
description: Ice Wine is a rare hybrid strain from Terra Firma Exclusives, bred from Pimp Slap and a cross of Oregon Grapes and 1988 G13 HashPlant, known for its stunning appearance and unique genetics.

name: Sour Cookies
description: Sour Cookies is a hybrid strain from Girl Scout Cookies and Sour Diesel, offering an uplifting, cerebral high in small amounts and a stronger effect when smoked more heavily.

name: Bananas
description: Bananas is an indica-dominant hybrid strain developed by Leafs by Snoop, known for its unique flavor and often available in concentrate form.

name: Donkey Kong
description: Donkey Kong is a hybrid strain by 3rd Coast Genetics, created by crossing Grease Monkey and Pure Michigan, known for its balanced effects and unique flavor profile.

name: Blackberry Runtz Cake
description: Blackberry Runtz Cake is a balanced hybrid strain, 40% sativa and 60% indica, created by crossing Runtz Cake and Blackberry Kush, delivering a blend of flavorful effects.

name: Strawberry Pie
description: Strawberry Pie is an indica-dominant hybrid created by crossing Georgia Pie with Strawberry Fritter, known for its relaxing, soothing, and euphoric effects.

name: Frosties
description: Frosties is a hybrid cannabis strain with flavors and effects still being explored by the community.

name: Orange Fanta
description: Orange Fanta is a hybrid by Seattle Chronic Seeds, crossing Platinum Gelato Chem with Agent Orange x Hindu IBL, featuring green buds with purple and pink hues and a distinctive orange soda aroma.

name: Xeno
description: Xeno is a balanced hybrid strain, a cross between Zkittlez and Kush Mints, offering sweet, fruity flavors with a diesel kick and a 22% THC content.

name: Gorilla Cake
description: Gorilla Cake is a hybrid likely bred from Original Glue and Wedding Cake, delivering a heavy, sedative high with a smooth, thick, earthy, and chemical terpene profile.

name: Grape God
description: Grape God is an indica-dominant hybrid blending God Bud and Grapefruit genetics, offering a sweet grape aroma with earthy undertones and delivering powerful, long-lasting euphoria that eases stress.

name: Versace
description: Versace is a sativa-dominant hybrid blending Sour Diesel, OG Kush, and Granddaddy Purple to deliver a clear-headed, balanced experience with uplifting and relaxing effects.

name: Skunkberry
description: Skunkberry is a hybrid cross of Skunk and Blueberry, known for its distinctive aroma and unique terpene profile that blends the best qualities of both parent strains.

name: Purple Tangie
description: Purple Tangie is a citrus-infused sativa strain that delivers uplifting euphoria and invigorates the spirit with its vibrant, flavorful profile.

name: London Jelly
description: London Jelly is a THC-dominant hybrid strain created by Tiki Madman, bred from Pancakes and Jealousy, known for its exotic and rare genetics.

name: Sour Space Candy
description: Sour Space Candy is a CBD-dominant hybrid bred by Oregon CBD, combining the strong, flavorful Sour Tsunami with Early Resin Berry for a unique blend reminiscent of GG4 and Sour Diesel.

name: Crippy
description: Crippy is a balanced hybrid strain, 50% sativa and 50% indica, with roots in Hawaii and popularity in Florida during the late 80s and early 90s.

name: Froyo
description: Froyo is a hybrid strain from MacMints and Sunset Sherbert, featuring a frosty, fruity profile with creamy, tart flavors and 19% THC.

name: Runtz Buttonz
description: Runtz Buttonz is a hybrid strain created by crossing Runtz and Rainbow Chip, known for its uplifting, energetic, and focused effects.

name: Ray Charles
description: Ray Charles is a potent indica strain named after the legendary blues musician, featuring a strong earthy, skunky aroma and delivering full-body effects.

name: Peach Gelato
description: Peach Gelato is a 60% sativa, 40% indica hybrid strain blending Peach Rings and Gelato #33, delivering a flavorful and balanced cannabis experience.

name: Sugar Shack
description: Sugar Shack is an indica-dominant hybrid that offers a mild head and body-heavy sensation, making it ideal for evening use, but too much may lead to deep sleep.

name: Caramel Apple Gelato
description: Caramel Apple Gelato is an indica-dominant hybrid created by crossing Apple Cider with Jet Fuel Gelato, offering a calming and delightful experience with a 22% THC level.

name: 10th Planet
description: 10th Planet is a hybrid strain created by crossing Planet of the Grapes and Pluto cut of Quattro Kush, known for its heavy calyxes and out-of-this-world flavors and aromas.

name: Neville's Haze
description: Neville's Haze is a tall sativa named after Nevil Schoemakers, featuring mostly Haze genetics with a hint of indica, known for its pine cone scent.

name: Gorilla Zkittlez Auto
description: Gorilla Zkittlez Auto is a hybrid autoflowering strain by Fast Buds known for vigorous growth, high yields up to 600g/m², and strong, pungent terpenes, winning first place at Dabadoo Brasil 2022.

name: Orange Haze
description: Orange Haze, a sativa-dominant hybrid by Green Devil Genetics, blends the sweet citrus flavor of Orange Bud with the classic uplifting effects of Haze.

name: Sugar Rush
description: Sugar Rush is a balanced 50/50 hybrid strain, created by crossing Pyxy Styx and Mai Tai, with 20% THC, making it a great choice for experienced cannabis users.

name: OG Cookies
description: OG Cookies is a potent indica-dominant hybrid created by crossing OG Kush and Girl Scout Cookies, blending lemon, pine, and fuel notes with savory complexity for a balanced, flavorful experience.

name: Sky OG
description: Sky OG is a hybrid cannabis strain with unique flavors and effects that are still being explored by users.

name: Green Ribbon
description: Green Ribbon is a hybrid strain from San Jose, California, blending Green Crack, Trainwreck, Afghanica, and White Rhino, featuring light green buds with a subtle floral scent, fruity hints, and an earthy flavor.

name: Rocky Road

name: Orange Sunset

707 is a hybrid strain from Humboldt County, California, combining Sour Diesel, OG Kush, and Master Kush, with a flowering time of 9 to 11 weeks.

name: Gas Tanker
description: Gas Tanker is a potent hybrid indica strain, a cross between Gas and Sour Diesel, known for its strong diesel and citrus flavors.

name: Permafrost
description: Permafrost is a sativa-dominant hybrid by Rogue Buds, named for its frosty crystal trichomes and fresh pine aroma.

name: Tangie Dream

description: Sweet Cheese is a 70% sativa strain by Sweet Seeds that blends the unique flavors of Cheese and Black Jack to deliver long-lasting full-body relaxation with an intense effect.

grow_info.notes: The plants are sativa in their growing characteristics and should flower between 10 and 14 weeks. Flowers will be large but somewhat dense.
